text_en:
2. TCU Installation

Adjust the gear position sensor to the "N" position according to the indicated marks, align the connection ports of the TCU and AT, and gently press the TCU vertically until it is properly installed.
original:
2. TCU 安装

按照图示标记，将档位传感器调整到“N”档位置，对准 TCU 和 AT 的连接端口，沿竖直方向轻压TCU，使其装配到位。
paraphrases:
2. TCU 安装

依照图示标记，将档位传感器调至“N”档位置，对准 TCU 和 AT 的连接端口，沿竖直方向轻压TCU总成，使其装配到位。

2. TCU 安装

按图示标记，将档位传感器设定到“N”档位置，对准 TCU 和 AT 的连接端口，沿竖直方向轻压TCU，使其装配到位。

2. TCU 安装

根据图示，将档位传感器置于“N”档位置，对准 TCU 和 AT 的连接端口，沿竖直方向轻压TCU，使其装配到位。

text_en:
2. TCU Installation

• Install the TCU bolt, specification: $\mathbf{M8 \times1.25 \times20\ mm}$, torque: $23 \pm 2\ \mathrm{Nm}$.

• Install the shift lever, nut specification: $\mathbf{M8 \times1.25}$, torque: $16 \pm 2\ \mathrm{N\cdotm}$, and position the shift lever to the "N" gear.
original:
2. TCU 安装

• 装配 TCU 螺栓，规格： $\mathbf{M8} \times 1.25 \times 20 \mathrm{mm}$ ，扭力： $23 \pm 2 \mathrm{{ Nm} }$ 。

• 装上换挡臂，螺母规格： $\mathbf{M} 8 \times 1.25$ ，扭力：$16 \pm 2 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ ，将换挡臂拨到“N”档位置。

• 装好换挡臂，螺母规格： $\mathbf{M} 8 \times 1.25$ ，扭力：$16 \pm 2 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ ，将换挡臂拨到“N”档位置。

2. TCU 安装

• 装入TCU螺栓，规格： $\mathbf{M8} \times 1.25 \times 20 \mathrm{mm}$ ，扭力： $23 \pm 2 \mathrm{{ Nm} }$ 。

• 装上换挡臂，螺母规格： $\mathbf{M} 8 \times 1.25$ ，扭力：$16 \pm 2 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ ，将换挡臂拨到“N”档位置。

2. TCU 安装

• 拧入TCU螺栓，规格： $\mathbf{M8} \times 1.25 \times 20 \mathrm{mm}$ ，扭力： $23 \pm 2 \mathrm{{ Nm} }$ 。

• 装上换挡臂，螺母规格： $\mathbf{M} 8 \times 1.25$ ，扭力：$16 \pm 2 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ ，将换挡臂拨到“N”档位置。

text_en:
Hydraulic Torque Converter Oil Seal

1. Removal of Hydraulic Torque Converter Oil Seal

1.1. Refer to Section 1.1 in "Removal of Hydraulic Torque Converter" and drain the transmission oil.

1.2. Complete the removal of the AT assembly according to the procedure outlined in "Removal of AT Assembly."

1.3. Remove the hydraulic torque converter assembly.

Note:
- Be careful not to damage the hydraulic torque converter oil seal during removal.
- Handle with care to prevent the torque converter from slipping or dropping.

1.4. Use special tools to remove the hydraulic torque converter oil seal.

Note: During removal, be careful not to damage the oil pump sleeve.

2. Installation of Hydraulic Torque Converter Oil Seal

Oil seal.

Installation specification: Distance from the oil pump face $0 \pm 0.2\,\mathrm{mm}$

text_en:
(c) Pressure Test

(4) Start the engine, move the shift lever to D position, and test the oil pressure at engine idle.

Standard:

| Shift Position | D Range [kPa] | R Range (kPa) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Idle | 350–520 | 480–690 |

(5) During the oil pressure test, the SLT solenoid valve current should vary as shown in the diagram below (at idle, with the shift lever in D position).

- Maximum oil pressure control is vehicle condition-dependent. Therefore, oil pressure standard values cannot be measured under any conditions other than idle.
original:
(c) 压力测试

（4） 启动发动机，将换挡手柄搬到D档，在发动机怠速时测试油压。

标准：

| 换挡器位置 | D档[kPa] | R档(kPa) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 怠速 | 350-520 | 480-690 |

（5） 油压测试中，SLT电磁阀电流应按下图变化（怠速，换挡手柄处于D档）

-最大油压控制是通过车况控制的。因此，除了怠速工况，油压的标准值是无法测量的。

(c) 压力测试

（4） 启动发动机，将换挡手柄搬到D档，在发动机怠速时测试油压。

标准：

| 换挡器位置 | D档[kPa] | R档(kPa) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 怠速 | 350-520 | 480-690 |

（5） 油压测试中，SLT电磁阀电流应按下图变化（怠速，换挡手柄处于D档）

-最大油压控制是通过车况控制的。因此，除了怠速工况，油压的标准值是无法测量的。

(c) 压力测试

（4） 起动发动机，将换挡杆推至D挡，在发动机怠速时测试油压。

标准：

| 换挡器位置 | D档[kPa] | R档(kPa) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 怠速 | 350-520 | 480-690 |

（5） 油压测试中，SLT电磁阀电流应按下图变化（怠速，换挡手柄处于D档）

-最大油压控制是通过车况控制的。因此，除了怠速工况，油压的标准值是无法测量的。

(c) 压力测试

（4） 着车后，将变速杆挂入D挡，在发动机怠速时测试油压。

标准：

| 换挡器位置 | D档[kPa] | R档(kPa) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 怠速 | 350-520 | 480-690 |

（5） 油压测试中，SLT电磁阀电流应按下图变化（怠速，换挡手柄处于D档）

-最大油压控制是通过车况控制的。因此，除了怠速工况，油压的标准值是无法测量的。

text_en:
1. Precautions

| - This fault diagnosis procedure describes the process of identifying and repairing faults through fault codes. (Detailed work procedures are described in each individual inspection step). |
| --- |
| - The method for checking circuits and components using fault codes has been explained. If a fault occurs but cannot be detected during inspection, the issue may lie in another system. Therefore, it is necessary to first check other systems before examining the transmission. |
| - Depending on the inspection requirements, the vehicle may need to be lifted or certain components removed. The vehicle state at the time of the fault should be reproduced if possible, ensuring the vehicle is connected to a dynamometer and securely fixed to prevent movement. |
| - Except for specified operating methods, resistance measurements must be performed at normal temperature. If resistance is measured after the vehicle has warmed up beyond ambient temperature, the reading may differ from the specified value. Allow the component to cool to normal temperature before testing. |
| - If a battery is required during testing, do not use the vehicle’s battery. Prepare a separate battery for inspection purposes. |
| - Before starting inspection work, verify the routing of wiring harnesses and connector positions to ensure they can be restored to their original locations. |
| - When disconnecting connectors, take care to avoid pulling them apart. |
| - When inspecting wiring harnesses, it is best to connect diagnostic tool probes directly to the harness ends. |
| - When individually inspecting a component, exercise caution if the diagnostic tool probe or current will contact the part, as this could cause damage or deformation. |
| - When connecting components such as batteries, ensure correct polarity. Reversed polarity may damage the component. |
| - Handle components carefully to prevent damage or adverse effects. |
| - Before replacing the TCM, check the input/output signals of the faulty section (refer to "TCM Configuration"). |
| - After replacing the TCM or a transmission unit (internal components), ensure initialization of learning values and perform TCM initialization self-learning. (Refer to Function and Structure). |

original:
1、注意事项

| -该故障诊断流程描述了通过故障代码发现并修理故障的流程。(详细的工作流程在每个单独的检查过程中都有详细描述)。 |
| --- |
| -通过故障代码检查电路和零部件的方法已描述。(如果有故障发生但是又检查不到故障,故障可能发生在其它系统里。因此,首先检查其它系统而不是变速器是有必要的) |
| -根据检查,车辆有可能会被举起来或者拆除某些零部件。也许,会再现故障发生时的车辆状态,确保车辆已连接测功机并且已被固定好防止移动 |
| -除了指定的操作方法,测量电阻需要在正常温度情况下测试.如果电阻测试是在车辆运行后高于环境温度时测量,测试值可能与规定值之间有差异.测试前需要等到温度达到正常后再进行测试。 |
| -如果检测过程中需要使用蓄电池,不要使用车辆上的。单独准备1个蓄电池用于检查。 |
| -检查工作开始前,检查线束的走向和接插件的位置以保证它们能够恢复原始位置。 |
| -当拔开接插件时,小心防止将接插件拉开。 |
| -当检查线束时,诊断设备探针最好与线束端相连。 |
| -当单独检查一个零部件时,如果诊断设备探针或电流会与部件接触,要小心否则可能会损坏或使部件变形。 |
| -当连接部件如蓄电池时,不要装反极性,装反极性有可能损坏部件。 |
| -小心处理零部件防止损坏或造成影响。 |
| -替换TCM前,需要对故障部分的输入/输出进行检查(参考“TCM安排”) |
| -在替换TCM或者变速器单体后(内部部件),确保进行学习值的初始化并进行TCM初始化自学习。(参考功能和结构) |

| -小心处理零部件防止损坏或造成影响。 |
| -替换TCM前,需要对故障部分的输入/输出进行检查(参考“TCM安排”) |
| -在替换TCM或者变速器单体后(内部部件),确保进行学习值的初始化并进行TCM初始化自学习。(参考功能和结构) |

1、注意事项

| -该本故障诊断流程说明如何通过故障代码检测并维修故障。(详细的工作流程在每个单独的检查过程中都有详细描述)。 |
| --- |
| -通过故障代码检查电路和零部件的方法已描述。(如果有故障发生但是又检查不到故障,故障可能发生在其它系统里。因此,首先检查其它系统而不是变速器是有必要的) |
| -根据检查,车辆有可能会被举起来或者拆除某些零部件。也许,会再现故障发生时的车辆状态,确保车辆已连接测功机并且已被固定好防止移动 |
| -除了指定的操作方法,测量电阻需要在正常温度情况下测试.如果电阻测试是在车辆运行后高于环境温度时测量,测试值可能与规定值之间有差异.测试前需要等到温度达到正常后再进行测试。 |
| -如果检测过程中需要使用蓄电池,不要使用车辆上的。单独准备1个蓄电池用于检查。 |
| -检查工作开始前,检查线束的走向和接插件的位置以保证它们能够恢复原始位置。 |
| -当拔开接插件时,小心防止将接插件拉开。 |
| -当检查线束时,诊断设备探针最好与线束端相连。 |
| -当单独检查一个零部件时,如果诊断设备探针或电流会与部件接触,要小心否则可能会损坏或使部件变形。 |
| -当连接部件如蓄电池时,不要装反极性,装反极性有可能损坏部件。 |
| -小心处理零部件防止损坏或造成影响。 |
| -替换TCM前,需要对故障部分的输入/输出进行检查(参考“TCM安排”) |
| -在替换TCM或者变速器单体后(内部部件),确保进行学习值的初始化并进行TCM初始化自学习。(参考功能和结构) |

| P1225 | 空挡控制状态（手柄在R档） | 电磁阀保持（C3电磁阀保持） | 否 |
| P1229 | 完全的空挡控制状态（在D档变化时没有压力控制） | 在D档无动力 | 否 |

1、注意事项

| -该该诊断流程介绍了借助故障代码查找和修复故障的步骤。(详细的工作流程在每个单独的检查过程中都有详细描述)。 |
| --- |
| -通过故障代码检查电路和零部件的方法已描述。(如果有故障发生但是又检查不到故障,故障可能发生在其它系统里。因此,首先检查其它系统而不是变速器是有必要的) |
| -根据检查,车辆有可能会被举起来或者拆除某些零部件。也许,会再现故障发生时的车辆状态,确保车辆已连接测功机并且已被固定好防止移动 |
| -除了指定的操作方法,测量电阻需要在正常温度情况下测试.如果电阻测试是在车辆运行后高于环境温度时测量,测试值可能与规定值之间有差异.测试前需要等到温度达到正常后再进行测试。 |
| -如果检测过程中需要使用蓄电池,不要使用车辆上的。单独准备1个蓄电池用于检查。 |
| -检查工作开始前,检查线束的走向和接插件的位置以保证它们能够恢复原始位置。 |
| -当拔开接插件时,小心防止将接插件拉开。 |
| -当检查线束时,诊断设备探针最好与线束端相连。 |
| -当单独检查一个零部件时,如果诊断设备探针或电流会与部件接触,要小心否则可能会损坏或使部件变形。 |
| -当连接部件如蓄电池时,不要装反极性,装反极性有可能损坏部件。 |
| -小心处理零部件防止损坏或造成影响。 |
| -替换TCM前,需要对故障部分的输入/输出进行检查(参考“TCM安排”) |
| -在替换TCM或者变速器单体后(内部部件),确保进行学习值的初始化并进行TCM初始化自学习。(参考功能和结构) |

text_en:
1. Precautions

- When removing connectors, be careful not to pull out the wiring harness.
- When inspecting the wiring harness, it is best for the diagnostic tool probe to connect to the harness end.
- When connecting to the battery, ensure correct polarity; reverse polarity may damage components.

- Handle components with care to avoid damage or adverse effects.
- When testing a component individually, if the diagnostic tool probe or current might contact the component, proceed with caution to prevent damage or deformation.

Transmission Wiring Harness Location

Clamp: Clamp
original:
1.注意事项

当拆下接插件时，小心不要把线束拔出来

当检查线束时，诊断设备探针最好与线束端相连

当连接到蓄电池时，确保不要装反极性，装反极性有可能损坏部件。

-小心处理零部件防止损坏或造成影响

-当单独检查一个零部件时, 如果诊断设备探针或电流会与部件接触, 要小心否则可能会损坏或使部件变形。

(a) Neutral Position Self-Learning

| Body Control System Six-Probe Rear Parking Radar | Headlamp Vertical Adjustment System Keyless Entry and Start System |
| Air Conditioning System | Tire Pressure Monitoring System |
| Instrument System | Electronic Parking Brake |

text_en:
(a) IG Power Supply System

1. Check the voltage between IG and GND at the vehicle harness end

(1) Disconnect the TCU connector
(2) Turn the ignition key to ON
(3) Use a multimeter to measure the voltage between terminal 11 [IG] and terminal 9 [GND] at the vehicle harness end

Standard:

| Terminal [Function] | Voltage (V) |
| --- | --- |
| 11[IG]-9[GND] | 10–14 |

Note: Handle with care during measurement to avoid damaging the terminals.

2. Check for short circuit between IG and body GND at the vehicle harness end
original:
（a）IG 电源系统

1、检查整车线束端 IG 与 GND 之间的电压

（1） 断开 TCU 接插件

（2） 点火钥匙旋转至 ON

（3） 用万用表测试整车线束端 11[IG]和9[GND]之间的电压

标准：

| 端子[含义] | 电压（V） |
| --- | --- |
| 11[IG]-9[GND] | 10-14 |

注意:小心测量防止损坏端子

2、检查整车线束端IG与车身 GND 是否短路
paraphrases:
（a）IG 电源系统

1、检查整车线束端 IG 与 GND 之间的电压

（1） 断开 TCU 接插件

（2） 点火钥匙旋转至 ON

（3） 用万用表测试整车线束端 11[IG]和9[GND]之间的电压

标准：

| 端子[含义] | 电压（V） |
| --- | --- |
| 11[IG]-9[GND] | 10-14 |

text_en:
(a) Oil Temperature Sensor

1. Measure the resistance between terminals 8[OT] and 7[OTG] of the oil temperature sensor.

(1) Remove the TCM.
(2) Heat the transmission fluid, immerse the oil temperature sensor in the transmission fluid, and measure the resistance between terminals 8[OT] and 7[OTG] at different oil temperatures. The standard values are as follows:

Standard:

| ATF Temperature [Temperature: °C] | Resistance [kΩ] |
| --- | --- |
| -40 | 161 kΩ (maximum) |
| -30 | 36.3 - 52.1 kΩ |
| 10 | 5.626 - 7.303 kΩ |
| (25) | (3.5 kΩ) |
| 110 | 0.224 - 0.271 kΩ |
| 145 | 0.102 - 0.121 kΩ |
| 150 | 0.087 kΩ (minimum) |

2. Check for short circuit between terminals 8[OT] and 7[OTG] of the oil temperature sensor.

标准：

| ATF温度 [温度: °C] | 电阻[kΩ] |
| --- | --- |
| -40 | 161kΩ（最大） |
| -30 | 36.3 - 52.1 kΩ |
| 10 | 5.626 - 7.303 kΩ |
| (25) | (3.5 kΩ) |
| 110 | 0.224 - 0.271 kΩ |
| 145 | 0.102 - 0.121 kΩ |
| 150 | 0.087 kΩ（最小） |

2.检测油温传感器端子 8[OT]与 7[OTG]之间是否短

(b) 3 Solenoid Valve

| Terminal [Function] | Resistance (Ω) *20℃ |

| 5 [S1] - Vehicle Body GND | 11–15 |

text_en:
Cylinder Compression Check

Check the compression pressure of the four cylinders as follows:

1. Warm up the engine.

Note: After warming up the engine, place the transmission shift lever in "N" position, engage the parking brake, and chock the drive wheels.

2. Turn off the engine after it has warmed up.

3. Disconnect the wiring connector of the fuel injector.

4. Remove the ignition coil assembly and all spark plugs.

5. Install the special tool (compression gauge) into the spark plug hole.

| Item | Special Tool |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 09915-64510-001 Pressure Gauge |
| 2 | 09915-64510-002 Adapter |
| 3 | 09915-64530 Hose |
| 4 | 09915-67010 Holder |
original:
缸压检查

如下检查 4 个气缸的压缩压力。

1. 发动机预热。

注意：发动机预热后，将变速器换档杆置于“空位置，并固定停车制动器和顶住驱动轮。

2. 预热后关闭发动机。

3. 断开燃油喷射器的线束接头。

4. 拆下点火线圈总成及全部火花塞。

5. 将专用工具（压缩压力表）装入火花塞孔。

| 项目 | 专用工具 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 09915-64510-001 压力表 |
| 2 | 09915-64510-002 接头 |
| 3 | 09915-64530 软管 |
| 4 | 09915-67010 固定器 |

text_en: 6. Press down the clutch (reducing the engine's starting load), and press the accelerator pedal fully to the floor to fully open the throttle.
original: 6. 踩下离合器（减轻发动机的起动负荷），将油门踏板向下压到最大限度使节气门完全打开。
paraphrases: 6. 踩下离合器踏板（减轻发动机的起动负荷），将油门踏板踩到底使节气门完全打开。
6. 将离合器踩到底（减轻发动机的起动负荷），将油门踏板完全踩下使节气门完全打开。
6. 把离合器踩下（减轻发动机的起动负荷），将油门踏板向下压到最大限度使节气门完全打开。

text_en:
Valve Clearance Inspection and Adjustment

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Rear of engine |
| 2 | Camshaft timing mark |
| 3 | Camshaft timing tool |
| 4 | Camshaft timing mark |
| 5 | Front of engine |
| 6 | Cranks shaft timing tool |

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable.

2. Remove the cylinder head cover.

3. Rotate the crankshaft clockwise until the painted small planes on both camshafts are horizontally upward, and align the positioning hole on the flywheel with the locating pin hole on the cylinder block. Secure the camshaft and crankshaft using the dedicated timing tool. Use a feeler gauge to measure sequentially the intake valve clearances for cylinders 1 and 2, and the exhaust valve clearances for cylinders 1 and 3.

4. Rotate the crankshaft clockwise until the painted small planes on both camshafts are horizontally downward, and align the positioning hole on the flywheel with the locating pin hole on the cylinder block. Secure the camshaft and crankshaft using the dedicated timing tool. Use a feeler gauge to measure sequentially the intake valve clearances for cylinders 3 and 4, and the exhaust valve clearances for cylinders 2 and 4.

5. If the valve clearance exceeds the standard value, replace the corresponding valve tappet according to the measured clearance value to adjust the valve clearance, then recheck to ensure the clearance is within the specified range.

| Valve Clearance Specifications | Cold State (Coolant Temperature: 15–25°C) | Cold State (Coolant Temperature: 15–25°C) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Valve Clearance Specifications | Intake | 0.16–0.24 mm |
| Valve Clearance Specifications | Exhaust | 0.26–0.34 mm |

Tightening Torque: 12 ± 2 N·m

6. After completing inspection and adjustment for all valves, reinstall components in the reverse order of disassembly.
original:
气门间隙检查和调整

| 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 发动机后端 |
| 2 | 凸轮轴正时标记 |
| 3 | 凸轮轴正时工装 |
| 4 | 凸轮轴正时标记 |
| 5 | 发动机前端 |
| 6 | 曲轴正时工装 |

1. 断开蓄电池的负极电线。

2. 取下气缸盖罩。

3. 顺时针方向转动曲轴，使两凸轮轴涂漆的小平面水平向上，同时，飞轮上的定位孔与缸体的定位销孔对齐，并用专用正时工装固定凸轮轴及曲轴。分别依次使用塞尺测量 1、2 缸进气门间隙和1、3缸排气门间隙。

4. 顺时针方向转动曲轴，使两凸轮轴涂漆的小平面水平向下，同时，飞轮上的定位孔与缸体的定位销孔对齐，并用专用正时工装固定凸轮轴及曲轴。分别依次使用塞尺测量 3、4 缸进气门间隙和2、4缸排气门间隙。

5. 如果气门间隙超过标准，应根据间隙值更换对应的气门挺柱以调整气门间隙，然后再次检查，保证气门间隙在规定的标准内。

| 气门间隙标准 | 冷状态（冷却液温度15-25℃） | 冷状态（冷却液温度15-25℃） |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 气门间隙标准 | 进气 | 0.16-0.24mm |
| 气门间隙标准 | 排气 | 0.26-0.34mm |

拧紧扭矩：12±2N·m

6. 当所有气门的检查，调整结束后，按拆卸相反的顺序进行安装。

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Disconnect the positive and negative battery cables, then remove the battery.

2. Remove the engine decorative cover, as well as the ignition coil assembly and spark plug assembly.

3. Disconnect the ventilation hose from the cylinder head cover.

4. Remove the cylinder head cover along with the cylinder head cover gasket and spark plug seal ring.

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Pressure regulator assembly |
| 2 | Cylinder head cover assembly |
| 3 | Connector bolt between cylinder cover and wiring harness |
| 4 | Long cylinder head cover bolt |
| 5 | Overflow tube assembly |
| 6 | Hex flange bolt Q1840612 |
| 7 | Ignition coil assembly |
| 8 | Ignition coil bolt Q1840650 |
| 9 | Fuel filler cap assembly |
| 10 | Cylinder head cover wiring harness bracket |
original:
拆卸

1. 断开蓄电池正、负极电线，拆下蓄电池。

2. 拆下发动机装饰罩，以及点火线圈总成、火花塞总成。

3. 从气缸盖罩上脱开通气软管。

4. 拆下带气缸盖罩密封垫和火花塞密封圈的气缸盖罩。

| 4 | 气缸盖罩长螺栓 |
| 5 | 溢气管总成 |
| 6 | 六角面法兰螺栓 Q1840612 |
| 7 | 点火线圈总成 |
| 8 | 点火线圈螺栓 Q1840650 |
| 9 | 加油口盖总成 |

text_en:
Installation

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Rear of engine |
| 2 | Camshaft timing mark |
| 3 | Camshaft timing tool |
| 4 | Camshaft timing mark |
| 5 | Front of engine |
| 6 | Crankshaft timing tool |

2. Tool Installation Method:

After tightening the cylinder head bolts to the torque specified in Table A, rotate the crankshaft until the alignment hole on the flywheel aligns with the locating pin hole on the engine block. Insert the crankshaft timing tool into the alignment hole on the flywheel.

Position the intake and exhaust camshafts so that the "painted flat surface" on the camshaft timing marks faces upward. Then, install the camshaft timing tool as shown in the figure, engaging it into the camshaft timing locating surface.

• Assemble and tighten the camshaft cover bolts in their original order, following the arrow direction on the camshaft cover pointing toward the front of the engine, and tighten them to the torque specified in Table A.

• After the tool is properly aligned, proceed with installing the timing belt system as shown in the figure below.

3. Install the right engine mount simultaneously, tightening the bolts to the torque specified in Table A. The timing belt system and timing belt assembly are shown in the figure above.

4. Install the timing belt rear cover assembly onto the cylinder head without misalignment, and tighten the bolts to the torque specified in Table A.

5. When assembling the camshaft timing pulley, do not fully tighten the bolt initially, allowing relative rotation between the pulley and the camshaft.

6. Before installing the timing tensioner, inspect and ensure it rotates smoothly and that the adjustment arm has proper tensioning function. Initially pre-tighten the installation bolts while ensuring the tensioner's adjustment arm can rotate in the direction indicated by the arrow and effectively apply tension.

7. During installation of the timing tensioner, ensure the tensioner is properly positioned within its limit but do not fully tighten at this stage. Confirm that the tensioner's adjustment arm can rotate in the direction indicated by the arrow and apply tension correctly.

8. Install the timing belt as shown in the figure: route the belt around the crankshaft timing pulley, the timing belt idler pulley, and the camshaft timing pulley, then finally pass it over the tensioner pulley secured by a bolt. Check that the belt does not protrude beyond the edges of the pulley system or the flange of the crankshaft timing pulley, and ensure proper engagement between the belt teeth and the pulley teeth.

9. Then, use an Allen wrench to turn the tensioner adjustment arm in the direction indicated by the arrow on the arm, causing the tensioner pointer to align with the center of the tensioner adjustment plate. While maintaining the tensioner's position, tighten the tensioner bolt to the torque specified in Table A. Finally, tighten the camshaft timing pulley bolt to the torque specified in Table A.

10. The relationship between the timing belt system and the timing cover is shown in the figure. After completing the timing belt system installation, manually rotate the crankshaft 4 to 6 full turns while observing the top dead center (TDC) mark on the camshaft. At each TDC position for cylinder #1, the tensioner pointer must be located within the notch of the tensioner adjustment plate. Verify the camshaft timing again using the camshaft timing tool. If incorrect, disassemble and re-install the timing belt system accordingly.

11. The assembly location and relationship of the front-end belt drive system are shown in the figure below.
original:
安装

| 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 发动机后端 |
| 2 | 凸轮轴正时标记 |
| 3 | 凸轮轴正时工装 |
| 4 | 凸轮轴正时标记 |
| 5 | 发动机前端 |
| 6 | 曲轴正时工装 |

2. 工装安装方法：

将缸盖连接螺栓按表 A规定力矩拧紧后，转动曲轴，当飞轮上的定位孔与缸体的定位销孔对齐时，将曲轴正时工装插入飞轮上的定位孔。

将进、排气凸轮轴按照凸轮轴正时标记“涂漆小平面”面向上放置，凸轮轴正时工装按上图所示卡入凸轮轴正时定位面。

• 按凸轮轴盖上箭头指向发动机前端方向，依照原有顺序装配并按表A规定力矩拧紧。

• 工装正时定位后再按下图进行正时轮系的安装。

3. 同时对发动机右悬挂进行安装，按照表A 规定力矩拧紧。正时轮系和正时皮带装配如上图所

示。

4. 正时皮带后罩总成安装于气缸盖上不得偏斜，按表 A 规定力矩拧紧螺栓。

5. 凸轮轴正时皮带轮装配时先不拧紧，使其能够相对凸轮轴转动。

6. 正时张紧轮装配前应检查并保证转动灵活，调节臂具有张紧功能。装配时安装螺栓先预紧，同时保证张紧轮调节臂能够按箭头方向转动并张紧。

7. 装配正时张紧轮时候要保证正时张紧轮限位到位而暂不拧紧，同时保证张紧轮调节臂能够按箭头方向转动并张紧。

8. 将正时皮带按下图所示进行装配，绕过曲轴正时皮带轮、正时皮带惰轮和凸轮轴正时皮带轮后，皮带最后跨过用螺栓固定的正时张紧轮上。检查皮带确保不冒出轮系边缘和曲轴正时皮带轮档边，并保证带齿和轮齿正确啮合。

9. 然后用内六角扳手按张紧轮调节臂箭头方向转动调节臂，使张紧轮指针位于张紧轮调节板生摆动的同时对正时张紧轮螺栓按照表A规定力矩拧紧。最后将凸轮轴正时皮带轮螺栓按照表 A 规定力矩拧紧。

10. 正时轮系和正时罩壳安装关系如图所示。在装配完正时轮系后需转动曲轴 $4 \sim 6$ 圈，同时观察凸轮轴上止点标记，在每个1 缸上止点时正时张紧轮指针必须保证在张紧轮调节板凹槽且用凸轮轴正时工装复检凸轮轴正时是否正确，否则需重新对正时轮系进行装配。

11. 前端轮系和皮带的装配位置和关系如下图所示。

5. 凸轮轴正时皮带轮装配时先不拧紧，使其能够相对凸轮轴转动。

6. 正时张紧轮装配前应检查并保证转动灵活，调节臂具有张紧功能。装配时安装正时机构螺栓先预紧，同时保证张紧轮调节臂能够按箭头方向转动并张紧。

7. 装配正时张紧轮时候要保证正时张紧轮限位到位而暂不拧紧，同时保证张紧轮调节臂能够按箭头方向转动并张紧。

8. 将正时皮带按下图所示进行装配，绕过曲轴正时皮带轮、正时皮带惰轮和凸轮轴正时皮带轮后，皮带最后跨过用螺栓固定的正时张紧轮上。检查皮带确保不冒出轮系边缘和曲轴正时皮带轮档边，并保证带齿和轮齿正确啮合。

9. 然后用内六角扳手按张紧轮调节臂箭头方向转动调节臂，使张紧轮指针位于张紧轮调节板生摆动的同时对正时张紧轮螺栓按照表A规定力矩拧紧。最后将凸轮轴正时皮带轮螺栓按照表 A 规定力矩拧紧。

10. 正时轮系和正时罩壳安装正时机构关系如图所示。在装配完正时轮系后需转动曲轴 $4 \sim 6$ 圈，同时观察凸轮轴上止点标记，在每个1 缸上止点时正时张紧轮指针必须保证在张紧轮调节板凹槽且用凸轮轴正时工装复检凸轮轴正时是否正确，否则需重新对正时轮系进行装配。

11. 前端轮系和皮带的装配位置和关系如下图所示。

text_en:
Installation

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Front-end Belt Drive System Idler Gear Assembly |
| 2 | Integrated Alternator Assembly |
| 3 | Front-end Belt Drive System Flat Idler Assembly |
| 4 | Variable Displacement Compressor Assembly |
| 5 | Front-end Belt Drive Belt |
| 6 | Water Pump Pulley |
| 7 | Crankshaft Pulley Assembly |
| 8 | Water Pump Pulley Bolt |
| 9 | Front-end Belt Drive Tensioner Assembly |
| 10 | Hexagonal Flange Bolt (GB/T16674-1996-M10X1.25X80) |
| 11 | Crankshaft Pulley Bolt |

12. Before assembly, inspect the crankshaft pulley for burrs, flash, intact teeth, and no cracks; check that all accessory pulleys rotate smoothly, with no burrs, flash, intact teeth, and no cracks; ensure the front idler and tensioner rotate freely, with no axial play, no oil leakage, and no damage; verify that the belt has intact teeth, no exposed cords, and no cracks or other defects.

13. First install the front-end belt drive tensioner, front-end idler, water pump pulley, and crankshaft pulley assembly, and tighten them to the torque specified in Table A. Then route the front-end belt through the water pump pulley, idler, alternator, flat idler, compressor, and crankshaft pulley. Finally, use a socket to turn the tensioner shaft counterclockwise to install the belt onto the tensioner. Check that the belt is properly seated in the V-grooves of the pulleys and does not interfere with surrounding components.

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Disconnect the positive and negative battery cables, then remove the battery.

2. Drain the coolant and engine oil.

3. Remove the engine intake and exhaust systems, front-end belt drive mechanism, front and rear timing covers, timing components, thermostat housing, spark plug assembly, ignition coil assembly, camshaft position sensor, brackets, and other peripheral components mounted on the brackets such as the power steering pump, alternator, and air conditioning compressor.

4. Remove the engine cylinder head cover and the cylinder head cover gasket.

5. Remove each camshaft cover; when removing, gradually loosen the bolts in the sequence shown in the diagram, from 20 to 1.

Note: Once the cylinder head gasket is removed, it must not be reused.
When reassembling, always use a new cylinder head gasket assembly.

6. Remove the intake and exhaust camshaft assemblies, and take out the mechanical lifters.

7. When removing the cylinder head bolts, gradually loosen them in the sequence shown in the diagram, from 10 to 1 (in order from the outer edges toward the center).
original:
拆卸

1. 脱开蓄电池正、负极电线，拆下蓄电池。

2. 排出冷却液和发动机机油。

3. 拆下发动机进、排气系统，前端轮系机构、前后正时罩盖、正时机构、节温器座、火花塞总成、点火线圈总成、凸轮轴位置传感器、托架及托架上转向助力泵、发电机、压缩机等需拆下的外围零部件。

4. 拆下发动机气缸盖罩和气缸盖罩密封垫。

5. 拆下发动机各个凸轮轴盖，拆卸时需按下图所示20 至 1的递减顺序逐步拧松螺栓。

注意： 气缸垫一旦拆下，就不得再重复使用。

重新装配时，一定要使用新的气缸垫总成。

6. 拆下进、排气凸轮轴总成，取出机械挺柱。

7. 拆卸缸盖螺栓时，按下图所示 10 至 1 的递减顺序（由两端向中间的顺序）逐步拧松螺栓。

3. 拆下发动机进、排气系统，前端轮系机构、前后正时罩盖、正时机构、节温器座、火花塞总成、点火线圈总成、凸轮轴位置传感器、托架及托架上转向助力泵、发电机、压缩机等需拆下的外围零部件。

text_en:
Disassembly

8. Remove the engine cylinder head assembly and cylinder gasket assembly.

9. Use the valve lifter to compress the valve spring, then use tweezers to remove the valve lock.

10. Release the valve lifter tool, and remove the spring seat and valve spring.

11. Remove the valve from the combustion chamber side.

12. Use a special tool to remove the valve stem seal from the valve guide side.
original:
拆卸

8. 拆下发动机气缸盖分总成和气缸垫总成。

9. 利用气门提升器，挤压气门弹簧，然后利用镊子，拆下气门锁块。

10. 放开气门提升器工具，并卸下弹簧座和气门弹簧。

11. 从燃烧室一侧卸下气门。

12. 使用专用工具从气门导管一侧卸下气门油封。

text_en:
1. Cam wear

Measure the cam height using a micrometer. If the measured height is below the limit value, replace the camshaft.

| Cam Height | Standard | Limit |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Intake Cam | 45.72 mm - 45.88 mm | 45.64 mm |
| Exhaust Cam | 47.52 mm - 47.68 mm | 47.44 mm |

1. 凸轮磨损

利用千分尺，测量凸轮高度。如果测定高度在极限值以下，更换凸轮轴。

| 凸轮高度 | 标准 | 极限 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 进气凸轮 | 45.72mm-45.88mm | 45.64mm |
| 排气凸轮 | 47.52mm-47.68mm | 47.44mm |

| --- | --- | --- |

1. 检查凸轮磨损

text_en:
4 Valve Inspection

| Standard width of the valve seat contact mark | Intake and exhaust valves | Minimum 45° conical width for intake valve: 1.2 mmMinimum 45° conical width for exhaust valve: 1.4 mm |
| --- | --- | --- |

• Valve seat repair: If the contact mark produced by the valve and valve seat is uneven or outside the specified width range, the valve seat must be re-machined, cut, ground, and polished to finish.

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Valve seat reamer |

A. Exhaust valve seat: Use the valve seat reamer to perform two operations as shown in the diagram. Two reamers must be used: the first at a 30° angle, and the second at a 60° angle. The second operation must produce the required valve seat width. Exhaust valve seat width: $1.4 \mathrm{mm} - 1.6 \mathrm{mm}$.

B. Intake valve seat: The repair procedure is the same as for the exhaust valve seat.
Intake valve seat width: $1.2 \mathrm{mm} - 1.4 \mathrm{mm}$.

C. Valve lapping: Lapping the valve seat is performed in two steps. First, apply coarse lapping compound to the end face and lap using the valve lapping tool with the standard lapping method. Second, use fine lapping compound and repeat the lapping process using the same method.

text_en:
5 Cylinder Head Inspection

• Remove carbon deposits from the combustion chamber.

• Inspect the intake and exhaust ports, combustion chamber, and cylinder head surface for scratches.

• Flatness of the cylinder head surface: Use a straightedge and feeler gauge to check the surface at six locations. If deformation exceeds the following limit, level the cylinder head surface using a flat plate and approximately #400 waterproof abrasive paper (diamond abrasive paper). Place the abrasive paper on the flat plate and rub the cylinder head surface on it to remove high spots. If the feeler gauge reading still cannot be reduced within the specified limit, replace the cylinder head. Leakage of combustion gases from the cylinder head mating surface is often caused by warped deformation of the cylinder head surface, which can lead to reduced output power and engine overheating due to high coolant temperature. Deformation limit: 0.1 mm
original:
5 气缸盖检查

• 清除燃烧室的积碳。

• 检查气缸盖的进排气孔，燃烧室和缸盖表面是否有划痕。

• 缸盖表面的平直度：用刀口尺和塞尺，共在6 处检查表面。如果超过下述变形极限，用平板和约＃400的砂纸(防水金刚砂砂纸)校平缸盖表面：将砂纸放到平板上，让缸盖表面在砂纸上磨，以磨去高点。如果这样仍不能使塞尺读数降到极限范围内，应更换气缸盖。从缸盖接合面泄漏燃烧气体，往往是由缸盖表面卷皱变形引起的，这种泄漏会引起输出功率的降低及发动机水温高而过热。变形极限：0.1mm
paraphrases:

text_en:
6. Valve Spring Inspection

Refer to the data in the table below to check whether each spring is intact, with no signs of damage or weakened elasticity. Remember, weak valve springs can cause vibration and, due to reduced valve seat pressure, lead to gas leakage, resulting in decreased output power.

| Item | Standard |
| --- | --- |
| Valve spring free length | 46.9 mm |
| Valve spring preload | 220 ± 17.6 N |

• Valve spring perpendicularity: Use a straightedge and a flat plate to check the perpendicularity of each spring by measuring the gap between the spring end and the straightedge. If the gap exceeds the limit value given below, the valve spring must be replaced.

Valve spring perpendicularity limit: 1.8 mm
original:
6. 气门弹簧检查

参照下表数据，检查各弹簧是否完好，无损坏或变弱的迹象。记住，弹力弱的气门弹簧会引起振动，而且由于气门座压力降低，会产生漏气，以致降低输出功率。

| 项目 | 标准 |
| --- | --- |
| 气门弹簧自由长度 | 46.9mm |
| 气门弹簧预负荷 | 220±17.6N |

• 气门弹簧垂直度：利用直尺和平板，根据气门弹簧端部和直尺之间的间隙，检查各弹簧的垂直度。如果间隙超过下面给出的极限值，必须更换气门弹簧。

气门弹簧垂直度极限：1.8mm

1. Valve Train Assembly

| 1 | Valve Oil Seal Assembly |
| 2 | Valve Spring Retainer |
| 3 | Valve Lifter |
| 4 | Tapered Lock Block |
| 5 | Valve Spring |
| 6 | Valve |

The bore of the valve spring retainer must be free of foreign matter and properly positioned without tilting.

Apply gasoline engine oil to the mandrel (the portion contacting the valve oil seal), then press the valve oil seal into the valve guide, ensuring correct positioning. During installation, the oil seal's spring must not shift or fall off, and the lip must remain intact without damage.

text_en:
1. Assembly of the valve mechanism

When installing the valve, ensure that the 45° conical surface between the valve and the valve seat is clean and free of foreign matter. After applying gasoline engine oil to the valve stem and its end, insert the valve into the valve guide without any binding or resistance.
original:
1. 气门机构的装配

安装气门时，确保气门和气门座的 $45 ^{ \circ }$ 结合锥面应清洁无异物，并在气门杆部、杆端涂敷汽油机油后装入气门导管应无卡滞现象。

text_en:
4. Camshaft Installation

• The camshaft, camshaft bores, bearing caps, and bearing seats must be clean and free of foreign matter at their mating surfaces;

• Before installing the camshaft, apply engine oil to the camshaft journals in the cylinder head and the locations where the mechanical tappets are installed;

• After applying engine oil to the camshaft, install it correctly onto the bearing seats. During installation, avoid any impact or scratching on all camshaft and tappet surfaces;

• Install the camshaft caps sequentially, tightening their bolts symmetrically from center to sides, or simultaneously using a torque wrench to the torque specified in Table A; the bolt tightening sequence is shown in the following diagram (in order from 1 to 20).

• Until the timing belt is properly installed, do not rotate the crankshaft to prevent any piston from reaching top dead center, thus avoiding contact between valves and pistons.

5. As previously described, install the engine rear cover, timing mechanism, engine assembly bracket, power steering pump, alternator, and air conditioning compressor.

6. As previously described, install the engine spark plug assembly and cylinder head cover assembly.

7. Install the engine thermostat housing, thermostat assembly, ignition coil assembly, and engine front-end belt-driven components.

8. As previously described, install the engine intake and exhaust systems.

9. Check that all removed components have been fully reinstalled in their original positions.

10. Re-fill the engine with engine oil.

11. Re-fill the cooling system with coolant and purge air from the system.

12. Reconnect the negative battery cable.

13. Inspect each connection to ensure there are no leaks of coolant or engine oil.

14. Confirm that ignition timing is within the specified technical requirements.
original:
4. 凸轮轴的安装

• 凸轮轴及轴孔、轴承盖和轴承座的结合面上应清洁无异物；

• 放置凸轮轴前，在气缸盖凸轮轴轴颈、机械挺柱处安装位置涂敷机油；

凸轮轴涂敷机油后正确安装于轴承座上，安装凸轮轴的过程，不能碰、划伤所有凸轮轴和挺柱表面；

• 将凸轮轴盖依次装上，其上螺栓按从中间到两边的顺序对称拧紧或用拧紧机同时拧紧至表 A所规定的力矩，螺栓拧紧顺序如下图所示（1 至 20的顺序）。

• 从凸轮轴装配直到皮带装配到位之前，禁止旋转曲轴避免任何一缸活塞处于上止点，防止气门与活塞相撞。

5. 如前所述，安装发动机后罩壳、正时机构和发动机组合托架、转向助力泵、发电机、压缩机。 机组合托架、转向助力泵、发电机、压缩机。

6. 如前所述，安装发动机火花塞总成和气缸盖罩总成。

7. 安装发动机节温器座、节温器总成、点火线圈总成和发动机前端轮系机构。

8. 如前所述，安装发动机的进、排气系统。

9. 检查保证所拆下的所有零部件已全部装回到原位。

10. 给发动机重新加注发动机机油。

11. 冷却系统重新加注冷却液并排出系统中的空气。

12. 连接蓄电池的负极电线。

13. 检查每个接头，应无冷却液和机油泄漏。

14. 确认点火正时在技术要求范围内。

text_en:
Piston, Piston Rings, Connecting Rod, and Cylinder

Disassembly

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Gas Ring |
| 2 | Scraper Ring |
| 3 | Scraping Blade |
| 4 | Washer Ring |
| 5 | Piston |
| 6 | Piston Pin Retaining Ring |
| 7 | Connecting Rod Assembly |
| 8 | Connecting Rod Bolt |
| 9 | Connecting Rod Bearing |
| 10 | Piston Pin |

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable.

2. Drain the engine coolant and engine oil.

3. Remove the intake and exhaust systems, oil pan, and timing system as previously described.

4. Remove the cylinder head from the cylinder block as previously described. Mark the cylinder numbers on the cover.

6. Remove the connecting rod cap.

7. Install rubber sleeves onto the threads of the connecting rod bolts to prevent damage to the journal bearings, cylinder bores, and connecting rod bolt threads during removal.

活塞、活塞环、连杆和气缸

拆卸

| 2 | 刮环 |
| 3 | 刮片 |
| 4 | 衬环 |

| 7 | 连杆总成 |

| 9 | 连杆轴瓦 |
| 10 | 活塞销 |

1. 脱开蓄电池负极电线。

2. 排出发动机冷却液和汽油机油。

3. 按前文所述，将进排气系统、机油盘和正时系统拆下。

4. 按前文所述，将气缸盖从气缸体上拆下。

盖上标注气缸号。

6. 拆下连杆瓦盖。

7. 在连杆螺栓的螺纹上装上橡胶护套，这是为了避免在拆下连杆时，将轴颈轴承、缸孔和连杆螺栓螺纹损坏。

text_en:
Piston, piston rings, connecting rod, and cylinder

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Rubber sleeve |

8. Remove carbon deposits from the top of the cylinder before removing the piston.

9. Push the piston and connecting rod out from the top of the cylinder. They must be placed according to cylinder number to ensure correct installation during subsequent reassembly.

10. Use a piston ring expander to remove the two compression rings (gas ring, scraper ring), the scraper blade, and the spacer ring from the piston.

11. As shown in the diagram, carefully loosen the piston pin retainer and press out the piston pin.

| 1 | 橡胶护套 |

8. 从气缸里取出活塞之前，除去气缸上端的积碳。

9. 将活塞和连杆从气缸上端推出，取出时必须按缸号准确放置，以备后续安装时正确安装。

10. 用活塞环扩张器，从活塞上拆下两个压缩环（气环、刮环）、刮片和衬环。

11. 如图所示，小心松开活塞销卡环，同时压出活塞销。

11. 如图所示，小心松开活塞销卡环，同时压出活塞销。

text_en:
Cylinder

1. Inspect the cylinder wall for obvious scratches, unevenness, or bulging. If the cylinder is excessively rough, has deep scratches, or significant unevenness, replace the crankcase.

2. As shown in the figure, use a cylinder gauge to measure the cylinder at two directions and three positions (6 mm, 60 mm, and 110 mm from the cylinder top surface). Replace the crankcase if any of the following dimensions exceed specifications.

• Cylinder bore diameter exceeds tolerance.
• Deviation in roundness or cylindricity between two positions exceeds tolerance.
• Axial and thrust measurement deviation exceeds the roundness range.

Cylinder bore diameter limit: $\Phi 86.02 \mathrm{mm}$;
Cylindricity limit: $0.008 \mathrm{mm}$;
Roundness limit: $0.006 \mathrm{mm}$.
original:
气缸

1. 观察气缸壁有无明显的刮痕，凸凹不平或隆起，如果气缸非常粗糙或深刮痕或凸凹不平，则更换曲轴箱。

2. 如图所示，用气缸表，在两个方向和 3个部位（距离缸体顶面 6mm、60mm、110mm 处）测量气缸。如果以下尺寸超差，则更换曲轴箱。

• 气缸缸孔直径超差。

• 两个位置的圆度或圆柱度测量差值超差。

• 止推和轴向测量差值超过圆度范围。

气缸缸孔直径极限： $\Phi 86.02 \mathrm{mm}$ ；

圆柱度极限： $0.008 \mathrm{mm}$ ；

圆度极限： $0.006 \mathrm{{ mm} }$ ；

text_en:
Piston

1. Inspect the piston for wear, cracks, or other damage. Replace any piston that is damaged or faulty.

2. Piston diameter:
As shown in the figure, the piston diameter should be measured at a point 10 mm upward from the bottom of the piston skirt, in a direction perpendicular to the piston pin.
original:
活塞

1. 检查活塞有无磨损、裂缝或其它损坏，若存在

损坏的或有故障的活塞应进行更换。

2. 活塞直径：

如图所示，活塞直径的测量应在从活塞裙底面以上到活塞销的垂直方向的 $10 \mathrm{mm}$ 处。

3. Piston Clearance:

Piston clearance is the difference between the cylinder bore diameter and the piston diameter. The piston clearance must be within the following specified range. If it exceeds the tolerance, inspect the cylinder bore diameter or piston diameter, and replace the component that is out of tolerance.

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Piston Ring |
| 2 | Thickness Gauge |

Piston Clearance: 0.038–0.062 mm

Note: The cylinder bore diameter used here is measured at two positions in two directions.

text_en:
Piston Ring

Measure the piston ring end gap by inserting the piston ring into the cylinder and using a feeler gauge to measure the clearance. If the clearance exceeds the specified limit, replace the piston ring.

Note: Before inserting the piston ring into the cylinder, the carbon deposits on the top of the cylinder must be cleaned.

| Item | Item | Specification | Limit |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Piston Ring End Gap (after installation in cylinder bore) | First Ring | 0.20–0.35 mm | 0.5 mm |
| Piston Ring End Gap (after installation in cylinder bore) | Second Ring | 0.35–0.50 mm | 0.5 mm |
| Piston Ring End Gap (after installation in cylinder bore) | Oil Ring | 0.20–0.70 mm | 1.5 mm |

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Feeler Gauge |
| 2 | Cylinder Block |
| 3 | Piston Ring |

text_en:
Connecting Rod Assembly

1. Large End Side Clearance:

Under normal conditions, connect the large end of the connecting rod to the crankpin and check the side clearance of the large end. If the measured clearance exceeds the tolerance, replace the entire connecting rod assembly.

| Item | Standard | Limit |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Large End Side Clearance | 0.10–0.28 mm | 0.35 mm |

2. Connecting Rod Straightening Check:

Mount the removed connecting rod assembly onto a connecting rod straightening fixture and inspect it for bending or twisting. Replace if out of tolerance.

Bending limit: 0.05 mm
Twisting limit: 0.10 mm
original:
连杆总成

1. 大端侧隙：

在正常状态下，将连杆大端与曲柄销相连，检查连杆大端侧隙，若间隙测量值超差，则需更换连杆总成。

| 项目 | 标准 | 极限 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 大端侧隙 | 0.10-0.28mm | 0.35mm |

2. 连杆校直：

将拆下的连杆总成装到连杆校直器上，检查它是否弯曲或扭曲，若超差，则更换。

弯曲极限值： $0.05 \mathrm{mm}$ 扭曲极限值： $0.10 \mathrm{mm}$

text_en:
Crankpin and connecting rod bearing

1. Inspect the crankpin for irregular wear or damage. Measure the out-of-roundness or taper straightness of the crankpin using a micrometer. If the crankpin is damaged, or if out-of-roundness or taper straightness exceeds limits, replace the crankshaft.

Maximum allowable out-of-roundness and taper straightness: $0.005\,\mathrm{mm}$.

| Connecting Rod Bearing Model | Crankpin Diameter |
| --- | --- |
| Standard Size | Φ47.982–Φ48.000 mm |

2. Connecting Rod Bearing:

Inspect the bearing for signs of melting, pits, burning, or surface spalling, and examine the contact pattern. If any of these conditions are evident, the connecting rod bearing must be replaced.

3. Connecting Rod Bearing Clearance:

• Clean the removed connecting rod bearing and crankpin before checking the clearance.

• Install the connecting rod bearing onto the connecting rod and cap.

• Place a plastic gauge strip parallel to the crankshaft axis across the full width of the crankpin (avoiding oil holes), as shown in the figure below.
original:
曲柄销和连杆轴瓦

1. 检查曲柄销不规则的磨损或损坏。用测微计测量曲柄销的失圆度或锥直线度。若曲柄销被损坏，或失圆度和锥直线度超差，则更换曲轴。

曲柄销圆度和直线度极限： $0.005 \mathrm{mm}$ 。

| 连杆轴瓦型号 | 曲柄销直径 |
| --- | --- |
| 标准尺寸 | Φ47.982-Φ48.000mm |

2. 连杆轴瓦：

检查轴瓦有无熔解、凹坑、烧蚀或表层剥落等现象，并观察接触形状。若连杆轴瓦有以上明显情况，则必须更换连杆轴瓦。

3. 连杆轴瓦间隙：

• 检查轴瓦间隙前，清洁拆下的连杆轴瓦和曲柄销。

• 将连杆轴瓦安装在连杆和瓦盖上。

• 当与轴瓦连接时，与曲轴轴线平行放一片塑料塞规在全宽的曲柄销上，避开油孔，如下图所示。
paraphrases:
曲柄销和连杆轴瓦

1. 检查曲柄销有无不规则磨损或损坏。用测微计测量曲柄销的失圆度或锥直线度。若曲柄销被损坏，或失圆度和锥直线度超差，则更换曲轴。

曲柄销圆度和直线度极限： $0.005 \mathrm{mm}$ 。

| 连杆轴瓦型号 | 曲柄销直径 |
| --- | --- |
| 标准尺寸 | Φ47.982-Φ48.000mm |

2. 连杆轴瓦：

检查轴瓦有无熔解、凹坑、烧蚀或表层剥落等现象，并观察接触形状。若连杆轴瓦有以上明显情况，则必须更换连杆轴瓦。

3. 连杆轴瓦间隙：

• 检查轴瓦间隙前，清洁拆下的连杆轴瓦和曲柄销。

• 将连杆轴瓦安装在连杆和瓦盖上。

• 当与轴瓦连接时，与曲轴轴线平行放一片塑料塞规在全宽的曲柄销上，避开油孔，如下图所示。

曲柄销和连杆轴瓦

1. 检视曲柄销不规则的磨损或损坏。用测微计测量曲柄销的失圆度或锥直线度。若曲柄销被损坏，或失圆度和锥直线度超差，则更换曲轴。

曲柄销圆度和直线度极限： $0.005 \mathrm{mm}$ 。

| 连杆轴瓦型号 | 曲柄销直径 |
| --- | --- |
| 标准尺寸 | Φ47.982-Φ48.000mm |

2. 连杆轴瓦：

检查轴瓦有无熔解、凹坑、烧蚀或表层剥落等现象，并观察接触形状。若连杆轴瓦有以上明显情况，则必须更换连杆轴瓦。

3. 连杆轴瓦间隙：

• 检查轴瓦间隙前，清洁拆下的连杆轴瓦和曲柄销。

• 将连杆轴瓦安装在连杆和瓦盖上。

• 当与轴瓦连接时，与曲轴轴线平行放一片塑料塞规在全宽的曲柄销上，避开油孔，如下图所示。

曲柄销和连杆轴瓦

1. 检验曲柄销磨损情况或损坏。用测微计测量曲柄销的失圆度或锥直线度。若曲柄销被损坏，或失圆度和锥直线度超差，则更换曲轴。

曲柄销圆度和直线度极限： $0.005 \mathrm{mm}$ 。

| 连杆轴瓦型号 | 曲柄销直径 |
| --- | --- |
| 标准尺寸 | Φ47.982-Φ48.000mm |

2. 连杆轴瓦：

检查轴瓦有无熔解、凹坑、烧蚀或表层剥落等现象，并观察接触形状。若连杆轴瓦有以上明显情况，则必须更换连杆轴瓦。

3. 连杆轴瓦间隙：

• 检查轴瓦间隙前，清洁拆下的连杆轴瓦和曲柄销。

• 将连杆轴瓦安装在连杆和瓦盖上。

• 当与轴瓦连接时，与曲轴轴线平行放一片塑料塞规在全宽的曲柄销上，避开油孔，如下图所示。

text_en:
Crankpin and connecting rod bearing

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Plastic gauge |

• When installing the connecting rod big end cap, ensure the arrow mark on the big end cap points toward the crankshaft pulley side.

Tightening torque: $15 \mathrm{N\cdotm} +$ yield point

• Remove the bearing cap, place the scale on the surface of the plastic gauge, and measure the width of the plastic gauge at the widest point of the clearance. If the clearance is out of tolerance, install a new standard-size bearing and re-measure the clearance.

• If the clearance remains out of tolerance after installing a new standard-size bearing, replace the crankshaft.

曲柄销和连杆轴瓦

| 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 塑料塞规 |

• 当安装连杆大头盖时，检查大头盖上的箭头指向标志在曲轴皮带轮一侧

紧固扭矩： $15 \mathrm{N \bulletm +}$ 屈服点

• 拆下瓦盖，将标尺放在塑料塞规的面上，在间隙最宽点测量塑料塞规的宽度。若间隙超差，则用一个新的标准尺寸轴瓦，并重新测量间隙。

• 若用了一个新的标准型轴瓦，间隙仍然超差，则更换曲轴。

text_en:
3. Assemble piston and connecting rod:

• The arrow "→" on the piston top must point toward the front of the gasoline engine, and the protrusion on the large end of the connecting rod must align with the direction of the piston top arrow.

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Direction of piston top arrow |
| 2 | Protrusion |

• Pistons and connecting rod assemblies installed on the same gasoline engine must belong to the same mass group, and the mass difference between any two groups of piston and connecting rod assemblies must not exceed 7g.

text_en:
3. Assemble piston and connecting rod:

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Piston top arrow mark (pointing toward engine front) |
| 2 | Gas ring gap |
| 3 | Scraper ring gap |
| 4 | Lower scraper ring gap |
| 5 | Upper scraper ring gap |
| 6 | Wiper ring gap |
| 7 | Wiper ring gap |

6. Refill engine oil according to the "Engine Oil Change" procedure.

7. Refill engine coolant and bleed air from the system.

8. Reconnect the negative battery cable.

9. Check all connections for leaks of gasoline, coolant, oil, or air.

10. Verify that ignition timing is within specified technical parameters.

! Note: When installing piston pin retainers, ensure they are fully seated in the groove, and their openings should both face the piston top surface.

• The connecting rod cap must be matched with the connecting rod body from the same cylinder as during disassembly. During installation, the protrusion on the large end of the connecting rod should align with the direction indicated by the piston top arrow, both pointing toward the front of the engine.

Apply engine oil to the threads of the connecting rod bolts, then tighten them using the "torque + angle method" according to the torque values specified in Table A. Tighten the bolts in the sequence 1–4–2–3 or simultaneously using a torque wrench.

• After completion, the crankshaft turning torque should not exceed 14 N·m, and rotation should be smooth without any binding.

4. Install components following the reverse order of disassembly as previously described.

5. Inspect to ensure all removed parts have been reinstalled in their original positions; reinstall any missing components.

Table 1. Cylinder bore in crankcase and piston skirt dimension group matching (mm)

| 2 | Φ86(0,+0.01) | 85.948~85.962 | 0.038~0.062 |

3. 组装活塞、连杆：

| 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 活塞顶箭头标志（指向发动机前端） |
| 2 | 气环环口 |
| 3 | 刮环环口 |
| 4 | 下刮环环口 |
| 5 | 上刮环环口 |
| 6 | 衬环环口 |
| 7 | 衬环环口 |

6. 按“发动机机油更换”条款，重新给发动机加注机油。

7. 重新加注发动机冷却液，并将系统里的空气排出来。

8. 连接电瓶（蓄电池）的负极线。

9. 验证所有接头，无漏汽油、冷却液、机油和漏气现象。

10. 验证点火正时在技术参数范围内。

！ 注意：安装活塞销卡环时，应保证全部位于卡环槽内，其卡环开口方向应同时指向活塞顶面。

• 连杆盖应与拆卸前同缸号的连杆体相配合，安装时其连杆大端的凸台应与活塞顶箭头方向相一致，均指向汽油机前端。

在连杆螺栓螺纹上涂以汽油机油，按表 A规定力矩采用“扭矩 $^ +$ 转角法”拧紧螺栓，螺栓按1、4、2、3缸的顺序拧紧或用拧紧机同时拧紧。

• 安装完毕，曲轴的转动力矩应不大于14N.m，转动应平顺，无卡滞现象。

4. 按先前所述，按相反的拆卸程序进行安装。

5. 检查确保所有的拆卸部件都装回原来的位置，将没有重新安装的部件重新安装。

3. 活塞连杆总成的组装：

| 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 活塞顶箭头标志（指向发动机前端） |
| 2 | 气环环口 |
| 3 | 刮环环口 |
| 4 | 下刮环环口 |
| 5 | 上刮环环口 |
| 6 | 衬环环口 |
| 7 | 衬环环口 |

6. 按“发动机机油更换”条款，重新给发动机加注机油。

7. 重新加注发动机冷却液，并将系统里的空气排出来。

8. 连接电瓶（蓄电池）的负极线。

9. 验证所有接头，无漏汽油、冷却液、机油和漏气现象。

10. 验证点火正时在技术参数范围内。

！ 注意：安装活塞销卡环时，应保证全部位于卡环槽内，其卡环开口方向应同时指向活塞顶面。

• 连杆盖应与拆卸前同缸号的连杆体相配合，安装时其连杆大端的凸台应与活塞顶箭头方向相一致，均指向汽油机前端。

在连杆螺栓螺纹上涂以汽油机油，按表 A规定力矩采用“扭矩 $^ +$ 转角法”拧紧螺栓，螺栓按1、4、2、3缸的顺序拧紧或用拧紧机同时拧紧。

• 安装完毕，曲轴的转动力矩应不大于14N.m，转动应平顺，无卡滞现象。

4. 按先前所述，按相反的拆卸程序进行安装。

5. 检查确保所有的拆卸部件都装回原来的位置，将没有重新安装的部件重新安装。

text_en:
Vacuum Pressure Sensor View and Pin Configuration

Pin Definitions:

The vacuum pressure sensor has three pins, numbered from left to right as: Pin 3, Pin 2, Pin 1.

Pin 1 is power input, Pin 2 is ground, and Pin 3 is signal output.

Installation Location: Front cabin wall panel.
original:
真空压力传感器视图与针脚

针脚定义：

真空压力传感器有三个针脚，如图从左到右依次为：3 号针脚、2 号针脚、1 号针脚。

1 号针为电源输入、2号针脚接地、3号针脚为信号输出。

安装位置：机舱前壁板上。

text_en:
Schematic diagram and pin configuration of the boost pressure and temperature sensor

Pin configuration: The boost pressure and temperature sensor has four pins from left to right labeled 4, 3, 3, 1. As shown, pin 1 is grounded, pin 2 outputs the temperature signal, pin 3 is the power input, and pin 4 outputs the pressure signal.

Installation location

On the pipe behind the intake manifold and intercooler.

安装位置

进气歧管和中冷器后面管路上。

text_en:
Engine Assembly

Disassembly

| Item | Description | Item | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Left Mounting Bracket | 10 | Hex Flange Bolt + Flat Washer Assembly |
| 2 | Hex Flange Bolt | 11 | Hex Flange Bolt |
| 3 | Hex Flange Nut | 12 | Upper Right Mounting Bracket |
| 4 | Left Mounting Rubber Pad Assembly | 13 | Right Mounting Rubber Pad Assembly |
| 5 | Hex Flange Bolt | 14 | Hex Flange Bolt |
| 6 | Hex Flange Bolt | 15 | Rear Mounting Bracket |
| 7 | Front Mounting Bracket | 16 | Rear Mounting Rubber Pad Assembly |
| 8 | Front Mounting Rubber Pad Assembly | 17 | Hex Flange Bolt |
| 9 | Hex Flange Bolt | 18 | Hex Flange Bolt |

1. Follow the fuel pressure relief procedure described earlier to reduce fuel pressure in the fuel lines.

2. Disconnect all wiring connectors and sensor connectors connected to the engine.

3. Remove the battery and battery box.

4. Drain the transmission oil.

5. Drain the coolant.

6. Remove the air intake tube.

7. Disconnect all connections related to the engine's fuel system.

8. Disconnect all connections related to the engine's cooling system.

9. Disconnect all connections related to the engine's control air ducts.

10. Remove all clips associated with the engine wiring harness.

11. Lift the vehicle.

12. Drain the engine oil.

13. Disconnect the exhaust manifold from the muffler.

14. Disconnect the clutch release arm from the clutch cable connected to the transmission.

15. Disconnect the gear shift and upshift cables from the transmission.

16. Remove the right engine mounting bracket bolts and the left, front, and rear rubber pad bolts.

17. Remove the engine assembly with transmission from the engine compartment.

18. Separate the engine from the transmission.

19. Disassemble the engine cylinder head cover and intake/exhaust systems as previously described.

20. Disassemble the engine oil pan and timing mechanism as previously described.

21. Disassemble the engine cylinder head as previously described.

22. Disassemble the engine crankshaft connecting rod mechanism as previously described.
original:
发动机总成

拆卸

| 项目 | 说明 | 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | 左支架 | 10 | 六角法兰面螺栓+平垫片组合 |
| 2 | 六角法兰面螺栓 | 11 | 六角法兰面螺栓 |
| 3 | 六角法兰面螺母 | 12 | 上右支架 |
| 4 | 左悬挂软垫总成 | 13 | 右悬挂软垫总成 |
| 5 | 六角法兰面螺栓 | 14 | 六角法兰面螺栓 |
| 6 | 六角法兰面螺栓 | 15 | 后支架 |
| 7 | 前支架 | 16 | 后悬挂软垫总成 |
| 8 | 前悬挂软垫总成 | 17 | 六角法兰面螺栓 |
| 9 | 六角法兰面螺栓 | 18 | 六角法兰面螺栓 |

1. 按前面所述燃油卸压步骤，降低燃油管里的油压。

2. 断开与发动机相连的线束插接头和传感器插接头。

3. 拆下蓄电池和电池箱。

4. 放掉变速箱机油。

5. 放掉冷却水。

6. 拆下空气进气管。

7. 断开所有与发动机燃油系统相连的接头。

8. 断开所有与发动机冷却系统相连的接头。

9. 断开所有与发动机控制气道管路相连的接头。

10. 断开与发动机线束有关的所有卡子。

11. 举升汽车。

12. 放掉发动机机油。

13. 断开排气歧管与消声器的连接。

14. 断开离合器分离臂和变速箱的离合器拉索。

15. 断开变速箱的变速和换挡拉索。

16. 拆卸发动机右支架螺栓和左、前、后软垫螺栓。

17. 将带变速器的发动机总成从发动机舱取出。

18. 将发动机与变速器分开。

19. 按前所述拆卸发动机气缸盖罩和进、排气系统。

20. 按前所述拆卸发动机机油盘和正时机构。

21. 按前所述拆卸发动机气缸盖。

22. 按前所述拆卸发动机的曲柄连杆机构。

text_en:
1. Crankshaft

Radial runout of crankshaft:

Measure the radial runout using a dial indicator at the center journal. Slowly rotate the crankshaft. If the radial runout exceeds its limit, replace the entire engine crankshaft assembly.

Radial runout limit: $0.02 \mathrm{mm}$

Crankshaft thrust clearance:

Measure this clearance using the conventional method—installing the thrust washer and main bearing cap to position the crankshaft within the cylinder block. Use a dial indicator to read the axial (thrust) displacement of the crankshaft. If the clearance exceeds its limit, replace the thrust washer with a new, standard one.
original:
1. 曲轴

曲轴径向跳动：

用千分表在中心轴颈测量径向跳动，慢慢转动曲轴，如果径向跳动超过其极限值，则需要更换发动机曲轴总成。

径向跳动极限值： $0.02 \mathrm{mm}$

曲轴止推间隙：

按常规方法，即用安装止推片和轴颈轴承盖，把曲轴定位在缸体内测量这种间隙。

用千分表读出曲轴轴向（止推）方向的位移量，如果超出其极限值，用新的、标准的止推片替换超出极限值的止推片。

text_en:
1. Crankshaft

| Name | Standard | Limit Value |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Crankshaft thrust clearance | 0.06~0.26 mm | 0.36 mm |

• Ovality and taper (non-uniform wear) of the journal
Non-uniform wear of the crankshaft journal indicates a variation in diameter across the cross-section or along its length (or both). This variation can be determined by micrometer readings. If any journal is severely damaged or exhibits non-uniform wear exceeding the following limit values, the entire crankshaft assembly should be reground or replaced.

Ovality and taper limit: $0.005 \mathrm{mm}$

1. 曲轴

| 名称 | 标准 | 极限值 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 曲轴止推间隙 | 0.06~0.26 mm | 0.36mm |

• 轴颈的椭圆度和锥度（不均匀磨损）

不均匀磨损的曲轴颈表明了横断面直径内的一种差异或沿其长度（或两者）。可以采用千分卡尺读数确定这种差异。如果轴颈中的任一轴颈被严重损坏或不均匀磨损量超出了下述的极限值，应重磨曲轴总成或重新更换曲轴总成。

椭圆度极限值及锥度： $0.005 \mathrm{mm}$

text_en:
3. Main Bearing Clearance

Check the bearing clearance using plastic gauge according to the following procedure.

• Remove the main bearing cap.
• Clean the bearing and main crankshaft journal.
• Place a plastic gauge strip across the full width of the bearing (parallel to the crankshaft), avoiding the oil holes.
• Reinstall the main bearing cap as shown in the diagram above, and tighten the bolts evenly to the specified torque.

Note: To ensure an accurate clearance reading, the main bearing cap must be tightened to the required torque. Do not rotate the crankshaft when installing the plastic gauge.

Remove the main bearing cap and measure the width of the plastic gauge at its widest point using a scale. If the clearance exceeds the limit, replace the main bearings. Always replace the upper and lower bearing shells as a set; never replace only half of the bearing.

• A new standard bearing may produce the correct clearance. If it does not, regrind the crankshaft journal using a bearing with a size increase of 0.25 mm.
• After selecting new upper and lower main bearings, recheck the bearing clearance.

| Bearing Clearance | Standard | Limit |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Bearing Clearance | 0.03–0.058 mm | 0.03–0.058 mm |
original:
3. 主轴瓦间隙

按照下列程序用塑料塞规检查轴瓦间隙。

• 取下轴瓦盖。

• 清洁轴瓦和主轴颈。

• 在主轴颈上放一块轴承全宽度的塑料塞规（平行于曲轴），避开油孔。

• 按前述示意图安装主轴承盖并把螺栓均匀地拧紧至所规定的扭矩。

注意：为了确保间隙的正确读数必须主轴承盖

拧紧至所要求拧紧的扭矩。安装塑料塞规时切勿旋转曲轴。

取下主轴承盖，用标尺在塑料塞规的最宽点测量它的宽度。如果间隙超过其极限值，更换主轴瓦。始终把上、下瓦片作为一个整体来更换，绝不能只更换其中一半轴瓦。

• 一个新的标准轴瓦可能产生正确的间隙。如果不能产生正确的间隙，有必要用尺寸加大 $0.25 \mathrm{mm}$ 的轴瓦重新研磨曲轴轴颈。

• 在选择新的上、下主轴瓦以后，重新检查轴瓦间隙。

| 轴瓦间隙 | 标准 | 极限值 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 轴瓦间隙 | 0.03-0.058mm | 0.03-0.058mm |

text_en:
8. Cylinder block sealing surface deformation

Inspect the deformation of the sealing surface using a straightedge and thickness gauge. If the flatness exceeds its limit value, the cylinder block's flatness must be corrected.

| Name | Standard | Limit Value |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Flatness | 0.03 mm | 0.05 mm |
original:
8. 缸体密封表面变形

用直尺和厚度规检查密封表面的变形情况，如果平面度超过其极限值，则需要修整缸体平面度。

| 名称 | 标准 | 极限值 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 平面度 | 0.03mm | 0.05mm |

text_en:
Installation

1. Install the crankshaft assembly and crankshaft thrust washers.

• As previously described, select upper and lower main bearings accordingly; do not mix them up.

• Apply engine oil (gasoline oil) to the mating surfaces of each main bearing and the crankshaft journal. Each half of the main bearing has an oil groove; install the half with the oil groove onto the cylinder block, and the half without the oil groove onto the bearing cap. Ensure both halves of the main bearing are of the same size.

• Insert the crankshaft and thrust washer into the crankcase housing. The side of the thrust washer with the oil groove should face the crank arm of the crankshaft.

• Check the end runout of the flywheel ring gear using a dial indicator. If the end runout exceeds the limit, replace the flywheel. The maximum allowable end runout is 0.2 mm.
original:
安装

1. 安装曲轴总成、曲轴止推片。

• 如前所述，选配上下主轴瓦，不允许错乱。

• 在各主轴瓦与曲轴结合面、曲轴主轴颈面处涂敷汽油机油，两半主轴瓦的一半有一个油槽。把这一半装到缸体上，无油槽的另一半装到轴承盖上。确保两半主轴瓦为同一尺寸。

• 将曲轴、止推片装入曲轴箱上体内，曲轴止

• 用千分表检查飞轮齿圈的端面跳动，如果端面跳动超过其极限值，则更换飞轮，端面跳动极限值为：0.2mm

推片上的油槽所在面应朝向曲轴曲柄臂。

text_en:
Installation

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Camshaft Cap |
| 2 | Lower Main Bearing |
| 3 | Crankshaft |
| 4 | Thrust Washer |
| 5 | Upper Main Bearing |
| 6 | Engine Block |

2. As previously described, install the piston and connecting rod assembly, as well as the engine cylinder head sub-assembly.

3. As previously described, install the engine timing system and front-end accessory drive.

4. As previously described, install the oil pan assembly and cylinder head cover assembly.

5. As previously described, install the flywheel assembly, intake and exhaust systems, starter motor, and clutch assembly.

6. Install the engine-transmission assembly.

7. Check to ensure all disassembled components are reinstalled in their original positions, and reinstall any components that were not properly installed.

8. Refill engine oil according to the "Engine Oil Change" procedure.

9. Refill engine coolant and purge air from the system.

10. Reconnect the negative battery cable.

11. Verify all connections for leaks of gasoline, coolant, oil, or air.
original:
安装

| 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 轴承盖 |
| 2 | 下主轴瓦 |
| 3 | 曲轴 |
| 4 | 止推片 |
| 5 | 上主轴瓦 |
| 6 | 曲轴箱 |

2. 如前所述，安装活塞、连杆总成和发动机气缸盖分总成。

3. 如前所述，安装发动机正时系统和前端轮系。

4. 如前所述，安装机油盘总成和气缸盖罩总成。

5. 如前所述，安装飞轮总成、进排气系统、启动电机和离合器总成。

6. 安装发动机变速器总成。

7. 检查确保所有的拆卸部件都装回原来的位置，将没有重新安装的部件重新安装。

8. 按“发动机机油更换”条款，重新给发动机加注机油。

9. 重新加注发动机冷却液，并将系统里的空气排出来。

10. 连接电瓶（蓄电池）的负极线。

11. 验证所有接头，无漏汽油、冷却液、机油和漏气现象。

text_en:
Oil Pressure Inspection

Note: Before checking oil pressure, first verify the following:

1. Oil level in the oil pan.

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Low oil level mark |
| 2 | High oil level mark |

If the oil level is low, add oil until it reaches the high oil level mark on the dipstick.

2. Oil quality.

Replace the oil if it is discolored or degraded.

3. Oil leaks.

Repair any detected oil leaks.

1. Remove the oil pressure warning sensor.

2. Install the special tool (oil pressure gauge) into the vacant threaded hole.

3. Secure the engine tachometer.

4. Start the engine and warm it up to normal operating temperature.

5. After warming up, increase the engine speed to $3000 \mathrm{rpm}$ and measure the oil pressure.

Standard Oil Pressure

$80 \sim 550 \mathrm{kPa}$ at idle
$200 \sim 500 \mathrm{kPa}$ at $3000 \mathrm{rpm}$
original:
机油压力检查

注意：检查机油压力前，应首先检查以下几项：

1. 机油盘中的油位。

| 项目 | 说明 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 低油位标记 |
| 2 | 高油位标记 |

如果油位低，加油至油标尺上的高油位标记处。

2. 机油的质量。

如果机油变色或变质，应更换。

3. 漏油。

如发现漏油，应修理。

1. 拆下机油压力报警器。

2. 将专用工具（油压表）装人到空出来的螺纹孔内。

3. 固定好发动机转速表。

4. 起动发动机并预热到正常工作温度。

5. 预热后，将发动机的转速提高到 $3000 \mathrm{r / mi n}$ 并测量油压。

油压标准

$80 \sim 550 \mathrm{Kp a}$ 怠速

$200 \sim 500 \mathrm{{ kP a} }$ 在 $3000 \mathrm{r / mi n}$

| 4 | Oil filter unit |

Note: If the edge of the sealant tape protrudes beyond the switch thread, trim it flush.
Tightening torque: 24±1 N·m

6. After checking oil pressure, turn off the engine and remove the oil pressure gauge.

7. Before reinstalling the oil pressure sensor, remember to wrap sealant tape around the switch threads and tighten the switch to the specified torque.

8. Start the engine and check for oil leakage from the oil pressure switch.

9. Turn off the engine, connect the terminal to the pressure switch terminal, and cover the oil pressure switch with a protective cover.

text_en:
Oil Pan and Oil Pickup Filter

1. Remove the drain plug and drain the engine oil.

2. Remove the oil pan bolts, then remove the oil pan.

3. Remove the oil pickup filter bolts, then remove the oil pickup filter.

4. Clean

• Clean the mating surface between the oil pan and cylinder block. Remove oil, old sealant, and debris from the mating surfaces, and clean the inside of the oil pan.

Clean the oil pickup filter screen.

| 2 | Oil Pickup Filter Assembly |
| 3 | Lower Crankcase Reinforcement Plate |

Coolant Level Inspection

Check that the coolant level in the reservoir tank is between the MAX and MIN marks. If the engine coolant level is below the MIN mark, remove the pressure cap and add coolant.

text_en:
Caution

Drain the engine coolant only after the engine has cooled down, otherwise the coolant may scald the operator and cause serious injury.

1. After the engine has cooled down, remove the radiator cap. Turn the cap slowly counterclockwise until pressure is released, then continue turning counterclockwise to fully remove the cap.

2. Once the radiator cap is removed, open the drain valve and drain all coolant from the system.

3. Tighten the drain plug. Fill the system with coolant until full, then run the engine until the upper radiator hose becomes hot and firm.

4. Repeat steps 2) and 3) several times until the drained liquid is nearly colorless.

5. Drain the cooling system completely, then tighten the radiator drain plug.

6. Remove the reservoir tank: take off the reservoir, pour out the remaining fluid, clean the inside of the reservoir with soapy water, rinse thoroughly with clean water, drain completely, then reinstall the reservoir and hoses.

7. Add a mixture of high-quality ethylene glycol and water in a 45/55 ratio to the reservoir up to the maximum level mark.

8. Idle the engine until the cooling fan runs. Monitor the coolant level in the reservoir during this process; if the level drops, replenish the coolant immediately. Tighten the reservoir cap, then run the engine at approximately 2500 to 3000 rpm for about 5 minutes, then return to idle. Open the reservoir cap and check whether the coolant level has dropped. If it has, repeat the above steps several times until the coolant level no longer decreases. Idle the engine for about 1 minute, then turn off the engine.

9. If air remains in the cooling system, repeat step 8.

10. After transmission oil leakage, the transmission must be refilled. Refer to Section 3.3.2-2, Transmission Maintenance, for refilling procedures.
original:
告

在发动机冷却之后，再排放发动机冷却液，否则，冷却液将灼伤操作人员，从而造成严重的伤害。

1.当发动机冷却后，拆卸蓄水瓶盖。沿逆时针方向慢转蓄水瓶盖，等到压力释放后，沿逆时针方向继续转动盖子。

2.蓄水瓶盖打开后，拧开放水阀，排空系统内的冷却液。

3.拧紧排放塞。加水到系统加注满并运转发动机直到散热器上部软管变热变硬。

4.重复第 2)和3)步数次直到排放的液体接近无色。

5.排空冷却系统然后拧紧散热器排放塞。

6.拆卸蓄水瓶，取下蓄水瓶，倒出液体，用肥皂水清洗蓄水瓶内部，用干净水彻底冲洗，并排干，装好蓄水瓶和软管。

7.用 45/55 混合高质量乙二醇和水的冷却液加入蓄水瓶直到上限位置。

8.怠速发动机一直到冷却风扇运行，过程中关注蓄水瓶中冷却液面变化情况，液面下降后，随时补充冷却液。拧紧蓄水瓶盖，再以 $2500 \mathrm{rp m}$ 至 3000rpm运行发动机5 分钟左右，之后回到怠速。打开蓄水瓶盖，检查冷却液面是否下降，如有下降，则重复前述过程若干次，直到蓄水瓶冷却液面不再下降。怠速发动机1 分钟左右，关闭发动机。

9.如冷却系统内仍有空气，请重复8)步。

10.变速器油泄漏了后，需要重新加注变速器油，加注步骤见3.3.2-2 变速器的维护。

text_en:
Inspection of the pressure cap

1. Clean the pressure relief valve and sealing components of the pressure cap.

2. Inspect the sealing area of the pressure cap for cracks or curling.

· If the pressure cap does not meet requirements, replace it.

3. Fill the pressure cap inspection adapter completely with water or engine coolant, then install the pressure cap onto the adapter.

4. Clamp the pressure cap downward and gradually apply pressure. Check whether the pressure remains within the specified range for 10 seconds.

· If the pressure does not meet the technical specifications, replace the pressure cap.
original:
压力盖的检查

1. 清洁压力盖泄压阀以及密封部件。

2. 检查压力盖的密封部位是否存在裂纹或者翻卷现象。

·如果压力盖不符合要求，则进行更换。

3. 将压力盖检验适配器内注满水或者发动机冷却液，将压力盖安装到适配器上。

4. 向下夹住压力盖，逐渐加压。检验压强是否保持在技术规范之内达 10秒钟。

·如果压强不符合技术规范要求，则更换压力盖
paraphrases:

1. 清洁压力盖泄压阀以及密封部件。

2. 检查压力盖密封部位是否存在裂纹或者翻卷现象。

·如果压力盖不符合要求，则进行更换。

3. 将压力盖检验适配器内注满水或者发动机冷却液，将压力盖安装到适配器上。

4. 向下夹住压力盖，逐渐加压。检验压强是否保持在技术规范之内达 10秒钟。

·如果压强不符合技术规范要求，则更换压力盖

压力盖的检查

1. 清洁压力盖泄压阀以及密封部件。

2. 检视压力盖密封区域是否存在裂纹或者翻卷现象。

·如果压力盖不符合要求，则进行更换。

3. 将压力盖检验适配器内注满水或者发动机冷却液，将压力盖安装到适配器上。

4. 向下夹住压力盖，逐渐加压。检验压强是否保持在技术规范之内达 10秒钟。

·如果压强不符合技术规范要求，则更换压力盖

压力盖的检查

2. 查验压力盖密封处是否存在裂纹或者翻卷现象。

·如果压力盖不符合要求，则进行更换。

3. 将压力盖检验适配器内注满水或者发动机冷却液，将压力盖安装到适配器上。

4. 向下夹住压力盖，逐渐加压。检验压强是否保持在技术规范之内达 10秒钟。

·如果压强不符合技术规范要求，则更换压力盖

text_en:
Cooling Fan Removal/Installation

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable and remove the fan wiring harness connector.

2. Remove the two screws on the fan, then hold the fan frame and lift it upward to remove.

3. When assembling, align the left and right limit holes of the fan with the radiator protrusions, secure with screws; then install the remaining components in the reverse order of removal.

The cooling fan is driven by a motor that is activated by the ECU (and ECT sensor). Refer to "Generator and Emission Control" for details.

text_en:
Cooling System Maintenance

WARNING: To avoid the risk of burns, do not remove the pressure cap when the engine and radiator are still hot. Boiling liquid and steam may be forcefully ejected due to pressure if the pressure cap is opened too early.

The cooling system should be maintained as follows:

1. Inspect the cooling system for leaks or damage.

2. When the engine is cool, remove the reservoir cap and clean the cap and filler neck with clean water.

3. Check that the coolant level is appropriate and that it provides adequate freeze protection.

4. Ensure the cooling system pressure remains within 155 kPa. If any leaks are found in the cooling system, repair the faulty area. If the reservoir cap is defective, replace it with a new one.

5. Tighten all hoses and inspect each hose; replace any hose that is cracked, swollen, or otherwise damaged.

6. Clean the front portion of the radiator core.

7. Check the oil cooler hose connections for oil leaks.
original:
冷却系统维护

警告 为避免烫伤的危险，当发动机和散热器还热时，不得拆卸压力盖。沸腾的液体和蒸汽可能由于压力盖打开的太早而在压力的作用下喷出。

冷却系统应按如下进行维护：

1.检查冷却系统是否泄漏或损坏，

2.在发动机冷却时，拆下蓄水瓶盖，用干净水清洗蓄水瓶盖和加注口。

3.检查冷却液液位是否适当并是否有防冻作用。

4.冷却系统压力是否保持在 155KPa 内。如发现冷却系统有任何泄漏，修理故障点。如蓄水瓶盖发现问题，应更换用新盖。

5.紧固软管并检查所有软管，更换破裂、膨胀或有其它毛病的软管。

6.清洗散热器芯的前面部分。

7.检查油冷管接头是否漏油

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable.

2. As shown in the figure, remove the regulator outlet hose No. 2, the air-oil separator intake hose, the air-oil separator return oil hose, and the air-oil separator bracket assembly.

| Item | Description | Item | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 18 | Air-oil separator hose clamp | 22 | Regulator outlet hose No. 1 |
| 19 | Regulator outlet hose No. 2 | 23 | Air-oil separator intake hose |
| 20 | Check valve assembly | 24 | Pressure regulator valve insulation sleeve |
| 21 | Regulator T-pipe hose | 25 | Pressure regulator valve assembly |

3. As shown in the figure, remove the turbocharger pressure and temperature sensor assembly.

4. As shown in the figure, remove the fuel rail assembly with injectors.

5. As shown in the figure, remove the bolts securing the electronic throttle body, then remove the electronic throttle body assembly.

6. Remove intake manifold support I.

7. Remove the intake manifold assembly.

text_en:
Disassembly and Installation

1. Remove the connecting bolts between the upper and lower housing of the air filter.

| Item | Description |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Self-tapping screw ST5*30 |
| 2 | Air filter upper housing |
| 3 | Filter element |
| 4 | Air filter lower housing |

2. Open the air filter upper housing and remove the air filter element from the lower housing.

3. Inspect the air filter element for dirt or debris.

4. If necessary, use compressed air to blow dust from the clean side to the dirty side of the filter element. Replace the element if it is excessively dirty.

5. When reinstalling, follow the reverse order of disassembly (clean side facing upward).

| 4 | 空滤器下壳体 |

2. ”打开空气滤清器上壳，从下壳体中取出空气滤清器滤芯。

3. 检查空气滤清器滤芯有无污物。

4. 需要时，可用压缩空气从滤芯空气干净侧向脏侧吹掉。如果太脏，应更换滤芯。

5. 安装时，按拆卸相反的顺序进行（干净侧在上方）。

5. 安装时，按拆卸相反的顺序进行（干净侧在上方）。

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Disconnect the oxygen sensor wiring harness, remove the air filter outlet pipe, and disconnect the vacuum hose connecting the pressure relief control valve to the air filter.

2. Remove the exhaust manifold cover and three-way catalytic converter cover in sequence, then disconnect the inlet and return water pipes from the fuel inlet and return lines.

3. Remove the bolts connecting the exhaust manifold to the cylinder head.

4. Remove the integrated assembly of the exhaust manifold, turbocharger, and three-way catalytic converter as a whole.

5. Remove the sealing gasket between the exhaust manifold and cylinder head.

6. Remove the three-way catalytic converter lower cover assembly.

text_en:
Turbocharger Principle

Utilizing exhaust gases from the engine's exhaust manifold, the turbocharger's turbine is driven to rotate, which in turn drives the compressor wheel connected on the same shaft. The compressor wheel compresses fresh air through centrifugal force, increasing the air density entering the engine's intake manifold, allowing the engine to burn more fuel and thus generating greater power output.
original:
增压器原理

利用发动机排气歧管排气出的废气，驱动增压器的涡轮旋转，涡轮再带动与其同轴的压叶轮旋转。叶轮通过离心力的作用压缩新鲜空气，从而增大了进入到发动机进气歧管内的空气密度，使得发动机能燃烧更多的燃料，进而使发动机能产生更大的动力。
paraphrases:
增压器原理

利用发动机排出的废气，驱动增压器的涡轮旋转，涡轮带动与其同轴的压叶轮旋转。叶轮通过离心力的作用压缩新鲜空气，从而增大了进入到发动机进气歧管内的空气密度，使得发动机能燃烧更多的燃料，进而使发动机能产生更大的动力。

增压器原理

借助发动机排气歧管排出的废气，驱动增压器的涡轮旋转，涡轮再带动与其同轴的压叶轮旋转。叶轮通过离心力的作用压缩新鲜空气，从而增大了进入到发动机进气歧管内的空气密度，使得发动机能燃烧更多的燃料，进而使发动机能产生更大的动力。

增压器原理

以发动机排出的废气，驱动增压器的涡轮旋转，涡轮再带动与其同轴的压叶轮旋转。叶轮通过离心力的作用压缩新鲜空气，从而增大了进入到发动机进气歧管内的空气密度，使得发动机能燃烧更多的燃料，进而使发动机能产生更大的动力。

Precautions related to the turbocharger

Warning: Never lift the entire turbocharger assembly by external components such as push rods, as this may affect the sensitivity and reliability of the bypass valve actuator.

text_en:
Working Principle of Starter Assembly

When the vehicle key is used to activate the ignition switch, the S terminal of the starter motor solenoid is powered. The solenoid engages and extends the starter motor's one-way clutch into meshing position with the engine flywheel. At this point, the M and B terminals of the solenoid are connected, allowing current from the battery to flow into the starter motor, causing it to rotate and drive the flywheel to start the engine. Once the ignition key returns to its original position, the S terminal of the starter motor loses power, the one-way clutch retracts, and the M and B terminals of the solenoid open, stopping the starter motor operation.

Basic Parameters of Starter Assembly

| Parameter | Conventional Starter | Weak Hybrid Starter |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Rated Voltage | 12V | 12V |
| Power | 1.4KW | 1.4KW |
| Power Supply Performance | 12V, 60Ah | 12V, 60Ah |
original:
起动机总成工作原理

用车钥匙接通成车点火开关，起动电机电磁开关S端子通电，电磁开关吸合，并将起动电机单向器弹出至与发动机飞轮啮合位置，此时电磁开关M、B端子导通，蓄电池电流流入起动机，起动机起动运转，带动飞轮起动发动机；待钥匙开关复位后，起动机S端子断电，单向器回位，电磁开关M、B端子断开，起动机停止工作。

| --- | --- | --- |
| 额定电压 | 12V | 12V |
| 功率 | 1.4KW | 1.4KW |
| 电源性能 | 12V、60Ah | 12V、60Ah |

text_en:
Electromagnetic Switch Test

Note: Before testing, disconnect the excitation coil from terminal "M".

1. Remove the starter motor armature wire from the electromagnetic switch.

2. Connect the starter motor housing and the electromagnetic switch housing reliably to the battery negative terminal using a jumper wire.

3. Connect one end of another jumper wire to the battery positive terminal, and the other end to terminal No. 1 of the starter motor harness connector E05.

4. The starter motor pinion should extend outward.

5. Remove the negative wire from terminal "M"; the starter motor pinion should not retract.

6. As described above, reconnect the wires so that the pinion extends, then remove the negative wire from terminal "M" and check whether the pinion rotates outward. If not, replace the electromagnetic switch.
original:
电磁开关测试

注意：测试前必须将励磁线圈与接线柱“M”断

开。

1. 从电磁开关上拆卸起动电机电枢导线。

2. 用跨接导线将起动电机外壳及电磁开关外壳与蓄电池负极可靠连接。

3. 用另一根跨接导线一端连接到蓄电池正极，另一端连接起动电机线束接头 E05 的 1号端子。

4. 起动电机小齿轮应移出。

5.拆下“M”接线柱负极导线,起动电机小齿轮不应回位。

6. 如上所述的那样连好导线小齿轮,然后拆下“M”接线柱负极导线,检查小齿轮是否朝外转,否则应更换电磁开关。

text_en:
Small Gear Return Test

1. Connect the starter motor housing and the electromagnetic switch housing to the battery negative terminal reliably using a jumper wire.

2. Connect one end of another jumper wire to the battery positive terminal, and the other end to terminal No. 1 of the starter motor wiring connector E05.

3. The starter motor pinion should retract.

4. Disconnect the jumper wire connected to the battery positive terminal; the pinion should return quickly.

4. 断开蓄电池正极跨接导线连接，小齿轮应该迅速回位。

text_en:
No-load Test

1. Ensure the battery is fully charged.

2. Connect the starter motor, battery, and tester as shown in the diagram.

3. Run the starter motor and confirm it rotates smoothly. If the starter motor does not rotate smoothly, inspect the starter motor assembly.

4. Measure voltage and current while the starter motor is running.

5. If readings are outside the specified range, replace the starter motor.
original:
无负荷测试

1. 确保蓄电池已充满电。

2. 如图所示连接起动电机、蓄电池和测试仪。

3. 运行起动电机，并确认其转动顺畅。如果起动电机转动不顺畅，请检查起动电机装置。

4. 在起动电机运行时，测量电压和电流。

5. 如果不在规定范围内，请更换起动电机。

text_en:
Wheel Bearing Inspection

Note: Do not confuse looseness of the control arm ball joint with bearing looseness.

Tools

|  | Dial indicator holder |
| --- | --- |
|  | Dial indicator |

1. Lift the front of the vehicle.

Reference: Lifting (1.1.3 Towing and Lifting).

2. Rock the wheel to check for looseness in the front wheel bearing.

3. Quickly rotate the wheel to confirm smooth and quiet rotation.

4. Remove the front brake caliper and bracket.

Reference: Brake Caliper (2.3.1 Brake System, Removal and Installation).

5. Install an appropriate dial indicator holder or similar device on the wheel hub, then push and pull the wheel hub. Measure the axial clearance between the wheel hub and the front wheel bearing assembly. There should be no axial clearance. If axial clearance is present, replace the front wheel bearing.

似的设备，然后推拉车轮毂。测量车轮毂与前车轮轴承总成的轴向间隙。它不应有轴向间隙，如果有轴向间隙，更换前轮轴承。

text_en:
Wheel bearing inspection

6. Install the front brake caliper and bracket.
original:
车轮轴承检查

6. 安装前制动钳和固定板。
paraphrases:
车轮轴承检查

6. 安装前制动钳和固定板。

车轮轴承检查

6. 装好前制动钳及固定板。

车轮轴承检查

6. 装回前制动钳与固定板。

text_en: 1. Turn the steering wheel to the center position and lock it.
original:
调整

1. 将方向盘转到正中位置并锁定。
paraphrases:
调整

1. 将方向盘转至正中位置并锁住。

调整

1. 方向盘打到中间位置后锁定。

调整

1. 方向盘置于正中并锁紧。

text_en:
Adjustment

2. Loosen the locking nut of the rear suspension toe adjustment rod.

3. Rotate the rear suspension toe adjustment rod locking nut clockwise or counterclockwise to adjust the toe within the specified range.

| Rear wheel toe (one side) |
| --- |
| 4±2 mm |
original:
调整

2. 松动后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺母。

3. 顺时针或逆时针旋转后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺 母，调整前束至规定范围。

| 后轮前束（单侧） |
| --- |
| 4±2mm |
paraphrases:
调整

2. 松开后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺母。

3. 顺时针或逆时针旋转后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺 母，调整前束至规定范围。

| 后轮前束（单侧） |
| --- |
| 4±2mm |

调整

3. 顺时针或逆时针旋转后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺 母，调整前束至规定范围。

| 后轮前束（单侧） |
| --- |
| 4±2mm |

调整

2. 旋松后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺母。

3. 顺时针或逆时针旋转后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺 母，调整前束至规定范围。

| 后轮前束（单侧） |
| --- |
| 4±2mm |

text_en:
Adjust

4. Tighten the locknut of the rear suspension toe adjustment rod.

Tightening torque: $100 \pm 10\ \mathrm{N\cdot m}$.
original:
调整

4. 锁紧后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺母。

拧紧力矩： $100 \pm 10 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ 。

调整

拧紧力矩： $100 \pm 10 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ 。

调整

4. 紧固后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺母。

拧紧力矩： $100 \pm 10 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ 。

调整

4. 将后悬前束调节杆锁紧螺母锁死。

拧紧力矩： $100 \pm 10 \mathrm{N} . \mathrm{m}$ 。

text_en: Adjustment
original: 调整
paraphrases: 调整
调节
校准

text_en: 6. Ball joint locknut of the tie rod before loosen.
original: 6. 松动前横拉杆球头锁紧螺母。

text_en:
Front strut assembly

Disassembly

1. Partially compress the coil spring.

Note: As the coil spring is under extreme stress, handle with caution at all times to avoid injury.

2. Disassemble the front shock absorber and coil spring.
original:
前支柱总成

分解

1. 将螺旋弹簧局部压缩。

注意：由于螺旋弹簧处于极度受力状态，应时刻小心，以免造成伤害。

2. 分解前减震器和螺旋弹簧。
paraphrases:
前支柱总成

分解

1. 将螺旋弹簧进行局部压缩。

注意：由于螺旋弹簧处于极度受力状态，应时刻小心，以免造成伤害。

2. 分解前减震器和螺旋弹簧。

前支柱总成

分解

1. 局部压缩螺旋弹簧。

注意：由于螺旋弹簧处于极度受力状态，应时刻小心，以免造成伤害。

2. 分解前减震器和螺旋弹簧。

前支柱总成

分解

1. 对螺旋弹簧实施局部压缩。

注意：由于螺旋弹簧处于极度受力状态，应时刻小心，以免造成伤害。

2. 分解前减震器和螺旋弹簧。

text_en:
Front Strut Assembly

| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Front Shock Absorber Assembly | 1 |
| 2 | Front Buffer Block | 1 |
| 3 | Front Helical Spring Lower Pad | 1 |

| 6 | Front Helical Spring Upper Mounting Bracket | 1 |
| 7 | Bearing | 1 |
| 8 | Front Strut Upper Mounting Assembly | 1 |
| 9 | Thrust Nut | 1 |
| 10 | Dust Cap | 1 |

Step 1: Remove the thrust nut dust cap.

Step 2: Remove the thrust nut.

Step 3: Remove the upper mounting assembly.

Step 4: Remove the bearing.

Step 5: Remove the front helical spring upper mounting bracket.

Step 6: Remove the helical spring.

Step 7: Remove the dust cover.

Step 8: Remove the buffer block.

Step 9: Remove the front helical spring lower pad.

Assembly

Assembly in reverse order of disassembly.

Note: Ensure the spring end is correctly positioned on the spring seat.

text_en:
Front strut assembly

1. Remove the wheel.
Reference: Wheel and tire (2.1.4 Wheel and Tire).

2. Lift the vehicle.
Reference: (1.1.3 Towing and Lifting)

3. Remove the mounting bolts of the front wheel speed sensor bracket 1 and brake line bracket 2 on the front strut.
Torque: $23 \pm 2\ \mathrm{N\cdot m}$

4. Remove the stabilizer bar link ball joint from the front strut.
Note: Use a cloth to protect the ball joint during removal to prevent damage.
Torque: 90 ± 5 N·m

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Remove the wheel.
Reference: Wheel and Tire (2.1.4 Wheel and Tire, Removal and Installation).

2. Remove the steering column flexible universal joint mounting bolts.
Reference: Steering Column Assembly (2.4.4 Steering Column, Removal and Installation).

3. Lift the vehicle.
Reference: (1.1.3 Towing and Lifting).

4. Separate the front stabilizer bar from the connecting rod.
Torque: 90 ± 5 N·m

5. Remove the tie rod end to steering knuckle connection bolt.
Torque: 46 ± 4 N·m
original:
拆卸

1. 拆卸车轮。

参考：车轮和轮胎（2.1.4车轮与轮胎，拆卸与安装）。

2. 拆卸转向柱柔性万向节固定螺栓。

参考：转向柱总成（2.4.4转向柱，拆卸与安装）。

3. 举升车辆。

参考：（1.1.3牵引与举升）。

4. 将前稳定杆与连接杆分离。

扭矩：90±5 N.m

5. 拆卸转向横拉杆与转向节连接螺栓。

扭矩：46±4N.m

text_en:
Component Description

Tire Identification

The tire's size, model, load index, and applicable speed rating are encoded in a combination of letters and numbers stamped on the tire sidewall. Refer to the "Tire Identification Chart" for code interpretation. For ease of explanation, the example used in the chart is a P225/65 R17 101H tire specification. For all-season tires, additional markings such as M+S, M&S, or M-S (indicating mud and snow traction) may appear on the sidewall. Overload or light-load designations "×L" or "LL" might also be present on the tire sidewall; if neither "×L" nor "LL" appears, the tire is assumed to be standard load.

Tire Identification Chart (P225 / 65 R17 101H)

| P | Tire Type (not present on all tires) | P – Passenger car tire |
| --- | --- | --- |
| P | Tire Type (not present on all tires) | T – Temporary spare tire |
| P | Tire Type (not present on all tires) | C – Commercial vehicle tire |

text_en:
Wheel Runout Inspection

Measure wheel runout using a dial indicator. Remove the tire and measure radial and axial runout at the inner edges of the wheel rim on both sides (illustration $\textcircled{1}$). Fix the dial indicator near the wheel and tire assembly, slowly rotate the wheel one full turn, and record the dial indicator readings. If the measured values exceed the specified limits and wheel imbalance cannot eliminate vibration, replace the wheel.

Measure free radial runout at the center of the tread (illustration $\textcircled{2}$). A strip of tape may be applied to the tread to create a smooth surface. Measure the free face runout at the outermost part of the tire nearest to the tread (illustration $\textcircled{3}$).
original:
车轮跳动检查

用千分表测量车轮跳动量，测量时，需拆下轮胎，在轮辋两内侧轮缘处测量径向和端向跳动。（图示 $\textcircled{1}$ ），将千分表固定在车轮和轮胎总成旁边，缓慢转动车轮一圈并记录千分表读数，如果测量值超过如下数值，且车轮平衡也不能消除振动，则更换车轮。

测量胎面中心的自由径向跳动（图示 $\textcircled{2}$ ）。可在胎面上贴一条胶带，形成光滑表面。测量最靠近胎面的轮胎外侧的自由端面跳动（图示 $\textcircled{3}$ ）。

Underinflation
Excessive Speed

| Measures: Adjust toe to specification | Measures: Adjust toe to specification |

|  |  |

text_en:
Disassembly and Installation

Disassembly

1. Loosen the wheel mounting nuts counterclockwise.
Torque: 110 ± 10 N·m

2. Lift the vehicle.
Reference: (1.1.3 Towing and Lifting).

3. Remove the wheel mounting nuts, then take off the wheel and tire.

Note: Do not use heating methods to loosen seized wheel nuts. Heating may damage the wheel and hub.

Note: Remove rust and dust from the mounting surfaces of the wheel, hub, or brake rotor. These contaminants may cause wheel bolts to loosen or the wheel to come off during driving. Failure to follow the above instructions may result in personal injury.
original:
拆卸和安装

拆卸

1. 逆时针拧松车轮固定螺母。

扭矩：110±10N.m

2.举升车辆。

参考：（1.1.3牵引与举升）。

3. 拆车轮固定螺母，取下车轮和轮胎。

注意：不要使用加热的方法来松动卡死的车轮螺母。加热可能损坏车轮和轮毂。

注意：去除车轮、轮毂或制动盘安装面上的锈迹和灰尘。这些东西有可能导致车轮螺栓松动或汽车行驶时车轮松脱，不遵循以上说明可能导致人身伤害。

Materials

text_en:
Outer Constant Velocity Joint and Dust Cover

Disassembly

Special Tools

| 3425 | Dust Cover Clamp Remover for Drive Shaft |
| --- | --- |
| 3425 | Dust Cover Clamp Installer for Drive Shaft |

Materials

| Name | Model |
| --- | --- |
| High-Performance Grease | TSCB-1 (Fixed End) OLCi (Right Mobile End) |

1. Remove the drive shaft.
Refer to: Left-side Drive Shaft (2.2.2-5 Drive Shaft, Removal and Installation).

2. Remove the dust cover clamp.
· Use the special tool to remove the dust cover clamp.
Special Tool: Drive Shaft Dust Cover Clamp Remover
· Remove the dust cover.
· Clean off the grease.

3. Remove the ball cage and cage assembly from the housing.
· Use a pair of needle-nose pliers to expand the retaining ring.
· Gently tap with a copper rod to remove the constant velocity joint.
· Remove the drive shaft $\textcircled{1}$ from inside the constant velocity joint.
· Remove the snap ring $\textcircled{2}$ from inside the constant velocity joint.
· Remove the dust cover $\textcircled{3}$.

text_en:
Installation

1. Install the drive shaft onto the drive axle.

Note: Protect the drive shaft to avoid damaging the constant velocity (CV) joints. The working angle of the inner CV joint must not exceed 23 degrees. The working angle of the outer CV joint must not exceed 45 degrees.

Note: When inserting the drive shaft, use the oil seal installer (provided with the oil seal) to protect the drive axle oil seal.

Note: When installing a new retaining ring, ensure the ring is properly seated in the groove.

1. Remove the three bolts securing the drive shaft center support.

注意：插入驱动轴时，使用油封安装器（随油封供应）以保护驱动桥油封

注意：安装新挡圈时确保挡圈已安装到槽里。
