text_en:
Brake Disc Runout and Thickness Inspection

Warning: Wear safety goggles for protection.

General Tools

| Dial Indicator Mount |
| --- |
| Dial Indicator |
| Depth Gauge |

1. Lift the vehicle.

Reference: Lifting (Towing and Lifting)

2. Remove the front wheel.

Reference: Wheels and Tires (2.1.4 Wheels and Tires, Removal and Installation)

3. Remove the brake pads.

Reference: Brake Pads (2.3.2 Front Disc Brakes, Removal and Installation)

4. Install the wheel nuts in reverse order to secure the brake disc in place.

5. Install the dial indicator and mounting stand onto the suspension strut.

6. Position the dial indicator at a point 10 mm from the outer edge of the brake disc, ensuring it contacts the friction surface at a 90° angle.

7. Rotate the brake disc until the dial indicator shows the minimum reading, then reset the indicator to zero.

8. Slowly rotate the brake disc until the dial indicator shows the maximum reading. Mark and record the runout value.

New Standard Value: 0.060 mm

If the brake disc runout exceeds the specified range, check the wheel hub runout using the same method. If the hub runout is within specifications, replace the brake disc.

9. Slowly rotate the hub to check for runout. If the runout exceeds the specified limit of 0.030 mm, and provided that the bearing clearance is normal, replace the hub.
original:
制动盘跳动量及厚度检查

警告：佩戴安全眼镜，以保证安全。

通用设备

| 千分表固定支座 |
| --- |
| 千分表 |
| 千分尺 |

1. 举升汽车。

参考：举升（牵引与举升）

2. 拆卸前车轮。

参考：车轮和轮胎（2.1.4车轮与轮胎，拆卸与安装） 。

3. 拆卸制动片。

参考：制动片（2.3.2 前盘式制动器，拆卸与安装）

4. 按相反的顺序安装轮胎螺母，将制动盘固定到位。

5. 在悬挂支柱上安装千分表和固定支座。

6. 在距离制动外缘 $10 \mathrm{\ mm}$ 的位置安装千分表，使其与制动盘摩擦面接触并成 $90 ^{ \circ }$ °。

7. 转动制动盘，直到千分表读数达到最小，然后将千分表归零。

8. 慢慢旋转制动盘，直到千分表上读数达到最大。标记并记录端面跳动量。

新品标准值： $0.060 \mathrm{mm}$

如果制动盘端面跳动量超过规定的范围，应按相同方法检查车轮轮毂的跳动，若车桥轮毂跳动正常，则更换制动盘。

9. 慢慢的旋转轮毂检察跳动，如果超出了规定的范围： $0.030 \mathrm{mm} .$ ,确保轴承间隙正常的情形下，更换轮毂。

如果制动盘端面跳动量超过规定的范围，应按相同方法检查车轮轮毂的跳动，若车桥轮毂跳动正常，则更换制动盘。

9. 慢慢的旋转轮毂检察跳动，如果超出了规定的范围： $0.030 \mathrm{mm} .$ ,确保轴承间隙正常的情形下，更换轮毂。

制动盘跳动量及厚度检查

警告：佩戴安全眼镜，以保证安全。

通用设备

| 千分表固定支座 |
| --- |
| 千分表 |
| 千分尺 |

1. 举升汽车。

参考：举升（牵引与举升）

2. 拆除前车轮。

参考：车轮和轮胎（2.1.4车轮与轮胎，拆除与组装） 。

3. 拆除制动片。

参考：制动片（2.3.2 前盘式制动器，拆除与组装）

4. 按相反的顺序组装轮胎螺母，将制动盘固定到位。

5. 在悬挂支柱上组装千分表和固定支座。

6. 在距离制动外缘 $10 \mathrm{\ mm}$ 的位置组装千分表，使其与制动盘摩擦面接触并成 $90 ^{ \circ }$ °。

7. 转动制动盘，直到千分表读数达到最小，然后将千分表归零。

8. 慢慢旋转制动盘，直到千分表上读数达到最大。标记并记录端面跳动量。

新品标准值： $0.060 \mathrm{mm}$

如果制动盘端面跳动量超过规定的范围，应按相同方法检查车轮轮毂的跳动，若车桥轮毂跳动正常，则更换制动盘。

9. 慢慢的旋转轮毂检察跳动，如果超出了规定的范围： $0.030 \mathrm{mm} .$ ,确保轴承间隙正常的情形下，更换轮毂。

text_en:
Installation

1. Use appropriate tools to compress the brake caliper piston.

Note: When pressing the brake caliper piston into the piston bore, brake fluid will be expelled from the master cylinder.

2. Install the brake pads.

Note: Brake pads must be replaced in pairs (i.e., both inner and outer pads replaced simultaneously).

3. Install the new caliper pin bolt with torque: 27±5 N·m.

Note: This bolt is a one-time use component and must not be reused.

4. Press the brake pedal forcefully more than twice.

5. Check the brake fluid level and add if necessary.

Note: The following procedures must be strictly followed when installing brake pads (both front and rear pads must be identical).
Measure the brake rotor thickness to ensure it is within specifications; ensure the spring clips have sufficient rebound force, with no plastic deformation, cracks, or wear, and that all rust and contaminants have been removed. Replace the spring clips if necessary.
original:
安装

1. 使用合适工具，压缩制动分泵活塞。

注意：当将制动分泵活塞压紧到活塞缸体里，制动液会从制动总泵中冒出。

2. 安装制动器摩擦块。

注意：摩擦块换新时须成对更换（即内摩擦块和外摩擦块同时换新）

3. 安装新的制动钳轴销固定螺栓，扭矩：27±5N.m。

注意：此螺栓为一次性使用件，不可重复使用。

4. 用力踩制动踏板两次以上。

5. 检查制动液位，必要时添加。

注意：安装摩擦块必须严格执行以下操作（前后块要求相同） 。

测量制动盘厚度，确保制动盘厚度合格；确保弹簧片具有充足回弹力，没有塑性变形、裂纹或磨损，并且已经去除所有的锈蚀和污物；如有必要，更换弹簧片。

Disassembly

1. Remove the brake pad.

Reference: Brake Pad (2.3.2 Front Disc Brake, Removal and Installation).

2. Disconnect the brake hose from the caliper.

Note: Plug the brake hose to prevent fluid leakage and contamination.

text_en:
2.3.4 Electronic Parking Brake System

The Electronic Parking Brake (EPB) system, as its name suggests, eliminates the traditional hand-operated or foot-operated parking brake mechanism and replaces it with an electronically controlled button to manage the parking brake. Therefore, the primary advantage of this new type of parking brake system for drivers is its convenient and comfortable operation.

From a control functionality perspective, due to the comprehensive electrification of the parking brake system, it can be jointly controlled with other systems such as the Electronic Stability Control (ESC), significantly enhancing vehicle safety. Moreover, various control functions within the braking system are now implemented through electronic control, offering advantages that traditional mechanical parking brake systems cannot match.

EPB System Components:

1. Actuator
2. Caliper
3. Indicator Light
4. EPB ECU
5. EPB Switch
original:
2.3.4 电子驻车制动系统

电子驻车制动系统简称 EPB 系统，EPB 系统去掉了传统的手拉式或脚踩式驻车操纵机构，改为用一个电控按钮对驻车制动器进行控制。因此对于驾驶员来说，这种新型驻车制动系统最大的优点就是操作方式方便而舒适。

从控制功能角度来看，由于对驻车制动系统进行了全面电气化改造，驻车制动系统能够和其他控制系统例如电子稳定控制系统（ESC）进行联合控制，因此车辆安全性能得到大幅提升，而且制动系统范畴内多种控制功能都以电控方式来实现，这些优点是传统机械驻车操纵系统无法比拟的。

EPB系统零件构成：

1.执行机构
2.卡钳
3.指示灯
4.EPB ECU
5.EPB 开关

text_en:
Brake Master Cylinder and Brake Fluid Reservoir

Removal

Materials

| Name | Model |
| --- | --- |
| Brake Fluid | HZY4 (or DOT4) |

Note: The reservoir cap must not be contaminated.

1. Remove the reservoir cap.
· Unscrew the reservoir cap counterclockwise to remove it.

2. Drain the brake fluid from the reservoir.
· Attach one end of a suitable clean plastic tube to the system bleeder valve, and the other end into an appropriate container.
· Loosen the bleeder valve.
· Press the brake pedal repeatedly until all the brake fluid in the reservoir has been completely drained.
· Tighten the bleeder valve.
Note: To completely drain all brake fluid from the reservoir, this procedure must be performed on both sides.

text_en:
Three-pedal Assembly

For the AT brake pedal switch:
Press the brake pedal as far down as possible, then push the switch plunger upward with your hand until it cannot be pushed further. Rotate the switch clockwise by 45°, then pull it out.

Note:
Please rotate clockwise to loosen. Otherwise, damage to the brake light switch may occur.

尽量下压制动踏板，用手将开关柱塞往上顶到底后（推不动为止），顺时针将开关旋转45°，拔出即可。

注意：

请注意顺时针旋松，否则可能导致制动灯开关损坏。

original:
针对AT制动踏板开关：

装配开关前，请先确保制动踏板、制动主缸带真空助力器总成安装至车身上，并用锁销完成推杆拨叉与制动踏板臂孔的连接；确保踏板面在初始位置，将开关装入安装孔中，开关安装面与踏板支架表面贴合后，将开关逆时针旋转45°，听到“咔嚓”一声，即安装到位。

注意：

a. 插入方向唯一；

b. 务必保证制动踏板臂处于自由状态，不能人为干涉踏板臂位置；

c. 此时制动灯开关触点（开关柱塞）被开关限位块预压；

d. 请注意逆时针旋紧，否则可能导致制动灯开关损坏。

提示：

text_en:
Installation of the clutch switch

The installation sequence is opposite to the disassembly sequence. Ensure that when the clutch pedal is at its lower limit position, the protrusion amount d2 of the switch contact is 0~1 mm, and the tightening torque of the nut is $15 \pm 3\ N\cdot m$.
original:
离合开关的安装

安装顺序与拆卸顺序相反，同时保证离合踏板处于下极限位置时，开关触点伸出量d2为0~1mm，螺母拧紧力矩 $15 \pm 3 N \cdot m$ 。
paraphrases:
离合开关的装配

装配顺序与拆解顺序相反，同时保证离合踏板处于下极限位置时，开关触点伸出量d2为0~1mm，螺母拧紧力矩 $15 \pm 3 N \cdot m$ 。

离合开关的安装步骤

安装步骤顺序与分解顺序相反，同时保证离合踏板处于下极限位置时，开关触点伸出量d2为0~1mm，螺母拧紧力矩 $15 \pm 3 N \cdot m$ 。

离合开关的组装

组装顺序与拆除顺序相反，同时保证离合踏板处于下极限位置时，开关触点伸出量d2为0~1mm，螺母拧紧力矩 $15 \pm 3 N \cdot m$ 。

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Disassemble the brake master cylinder.

Reference: Brake Master Cylinder and Brake Fluid Reservoir (2.3.5 Hydraulic Brake Control, Disassembly and Installation)

2. Remove the connecting pin between the vacuum booster and the brake pedal.

1). Remove the retaining clip from the pushrod of the master cylinder and the connecting pin of the brake pedal arm.

2). Remove the connecting pin.

3. Remove the four mounting bolts of the vacuum booster.

Torque: 22 ± 2 N·m

Note: If brake fluid accidentally splashes onto the body paint, rinse immediately with water.
original:
拆卸

1. 拆卸制动总泵。

参考：制动总泵和制动液壶（2.3.5液压制动操纵，拆卸与安装）

2. 拆卸真空助力器与制动踏板连接卡销。

1). 将制动主缸推杆与制动踏板臂连接销上的弹性卡子取下。

2). 取下连接销。

3. 拆卸真空助力器 4 处安装螺栓。

扭矩：22±2N.m

注意：如果不慎将制动液溅到车身漆面上，应立即用清水冲洗。
paraphrases:
拆解

1. 拆解制动总泵。

参考：制动总泵和制动液壶（2.3.5液压制动操纵，拆解与装配）

2. 拆解真空助力器与制动踏板连接卡销。

1). 将制动主缸推杆与制动踏板臂连接销上的弹性卡子取下。

2). 取下连接销。

3. 拆解真空助力器 4 处装配螺栓。

扭矩：22±2N.m

提示：如果不慎将制动液溅到车身漆面上，应立即用清水冲洗。

分解

1. 分解制动总泵。

参考：制动总泵和制动液壶（2.3.5液压制动操纵，分解与安装步骤）

2. 分解真空助力器与制动踏板连接卡销。

1). 将制动主缸推杆与制动踏板臂连接销上的弹性卡子取下。

2). 取下连接销。

3. 分解真空助力器 4 处安装步骤螺栓。

扭矩：22±2N.m

注意：如果不慎将制动液溅到车身漆面上，应立即用清水冲洗。

拆除

1. 拆除制动总泵。

参考：制动总泵和制动液壶（2.3.5液压制动操纵，拆除与组装）

2. 拆除真空助力器与制动踏板连接卡销。

1). 将制动主缸推杆与制动踏板臂连接销上的弹性卡子取下。

2). 取下连接销。

3. 拆除真空助力器 4 处组装螺栓。

扭矩：22±2N.m

须知：如果不慎将制动液溅到车身漆面上，应立即用清水冲洗。

· Remove the 3 mounting bolts securing the vacuum pump bracket assembly.

· Detach the vacuum pump and bracket assembly

· Separate the vacuum pump assembly from the vacuum pump bracket assembly in sequence: 1-2-3-4-5-6-7-8

text_en:
1. ABS/ESC System

Note: There is a rubber vibration isolator between the installation bolts and brackets of the ABS/ESC system. The function of the rubber vibration isolator is to protect the ABS/ESC system from vehicle vibrations. The ABS/ESC system is not serviceable as separate components and must be replaced as an assembly.

Main components of the ABS system include the ABS electronic control unit, hydraulic control module, and motor;

Main components of the ESC system include the ESC electronic control unit, hydraulic control module, and motor.

| Item | Component Name | Quantity |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | ABS/ESC Motor | 1 |
| 2 | ABS/ESC Hydraulic Control Module | 1 |
| 3 | ABS/ESC Electronic Control Unit | 1 |
original:
1. ABS\ESC系统

注意：ABS\ESC系统的安装螺栓和支架间有橡胶减振垫。橡胶减振垫的作用是使ABS\ESC系统免受车辆振动影响。ABS\ESC系统不可分解，作为总成更换。

ABS系统的主要部件包括 ABS 电子控制单元、液压控制模块和马达；

ESC系统的主要部件包括 ESC 电子控制单元、液压控制模块和马达。

| 序号 | 部件名称 | 数量 |

text_en:
ABS/ESC Hydraulic Control Module

Four inlet valves, normally open solenoid valves, each controlling one wheel. Four outlet valves, normally closed solenoid valves, each controlling one wheel. Two low-pressure accumulators and hydraulic lines. The ABS/ESC motor operates during self-check and when ABS/ESC is active, and can also be driven via a diagnostic tool.

Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) Hydraulic Circuit Diagram

Electronic Stability Control (ESC) Hydraulic Circuit Diagram

text_en:
ABS/ESC Hydraulic Control Module

Stage 1 – Pressurization Phase
The inlet valve opens and the outlet valve closes. The driver applies braking force to the brake pedal, causing system pressure to gradually increase.

Stage 2 – Pressure Holding Phase
Both the inlet valve and outlet valve are closed. The pressure at the wheel brakes (caliper or master cylinder) remains constant. Even if the brake pedal is pressed further down, the pressure in the caliper or master cylinder will not change.

Stage 3 – Depressurization Phase
The inlet valve remains closed while the outlet valve opens. The pressure at the wheel brakes (caliper or master cylinder) decreases, and the discharged brake fluid is returned to the master cylinder by the action of the ABS/ESC pump.
original:
ABS/ESC液压控制模块

第一阶段–增压阶段。

进油阀打开，出油阀关闭。驾驶员施加制动力至制动踏板，系统压力逐渐升高。

第二阶段–保持压力阶段。

进油阀关闭，出油阀关闭。车轮制动器（分泵或制动钳）上的压力保持不变。使制动踏板继续向下踩时分泵或制动钳的压力也不会再改变。

第三阶段–泄压阶段。

进油阀关闭，出油阀打开。车轮制动器（分泵或制动钳）上的压力下降，排出的制动液在ABS/ESC泵的作用下回到制动主缸。

text_en:
Hydraulic Control Unit (HCU)

Materials

| Name | Model |
| --- | --- |
| Brake Fluid | HZY4 (or DOT4) |

Note: If brake fluid accidentally splashes onto painted surfaces, rinse immediately with water.

Note: The reservoir cap must not be contaminated.

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable.

Reference: Battery Inspection (General Check)

2. Remove the reservoir cap.

Turn the cap counterclockwise to remove it.

3. Drain the brake fluid from the reservoir.

1) Use a suitable clean plastic tube; connect one end to the system bleed nipple and the other end into an appropriate container.

2) Loosen the bleed nipple.

3) Repeatedly press the brake pedal until all brake fluid has been completely drained from the reservoir.

4) Tighten the bleed nipple.

Note: To ensure complete drainage of all brake fluid from the reservoir, this step must be performed on both sides.

4. Disconnect the ABS control module wiring connector.
original:
液压控制机构总成（HCU）

材料

| 名称 | 型号 |
| --- | --- |
| 制动液 | HZY4（或DOT4） |

注意：如果不慎将制动液溅到漆面上，应立即用清水冲洗。

注意：储液罐盖不能被污染。

1. 断开蓄电池负极线束。

参考：蓄电池的检查（一般检查）

2. 取下储液罐盖。

逆时针旋转取下储液罐盖。

3. 排放储液罐内的制动液。

1). 使用一适当干净的塑料管，一端接上系统排气嘴，另一端通入一适当的容器中。

2). 旋松排气嘴。

3). 反复踩制动踏板直到储液罐中所有制动液全部排出。

4). 旋紧排气嘴。

注意：为将储液罐中的所有制动液彻底排净必须对两边都进行此步操作。

4. 断开 ABS 控制模块线束接头。

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable.

Reference: Battery Inspection (General Inspection)

2. Remove the rear seatback.

Reference: Rear Seat (5.1.3 Seat, Removal and Installation)

3. Disconnect the wheel speed sensor from the wiring connector.

4. Remove the rear wheel speed sensor harness bracket and its connecting bolt to the steering knuckle.

Torque: 9 ± 3 N·m

参考：后排座椅（5.1.3 座椅，拆卸与安装）

text_en:
Steering Wheel Play Inspection

Park the vehicle on a dry, flat surface with the vehicle in a straight-ahead position. Gently turn the steering wheel slightly to the right and left until resistance is felt, then measure the play value.

Maximum travel: 30 mm

Recommendation: If the play exceeds the maximum value, inspect the steering column and steering gear.
original:
方向盘游隙检查

把汽车停在干燥、平整的地面，使车辆处于直行状态，用手轻微向右和向左转动方向盘至感觉有阻力时测量其间隙值。

最大行程：30mm

建议：如果间隙值超过了最大值，检查转向柱及转向器。

最大行程：30mm

建议：如果间隙值超过了最大值，检查转向柱及转向器。

方向盘游隙检查

最大行程：30mm

建议：如果间隙值超过了最大值，检查转向柱及转向器。

方向盘游隙检查

最大行程：30mm

建议：如果间隙值超过了最大值，检查转向柱及转向器。

text_en:
Steering Return Performance Inspection

1. Start the vehicle and accelerate straight ahead to 35 km/h.

2. Turn the steering wheel left or right by 90°, hold for 1–2 seconds, then release.

3. If the steering wheel returns by more than 70°, the steering return performance is normal.

Recommendation: If return performance is poor, check the following items: steering gear performance, steering column performance, tire pressure, suspension system.

Component Location Diagram

| No. | Component Name         | Quantity |
|-----|------------------------|----------|
| 1   | Steering Wheel Assembly| 1        |
| 2   | Steering Column Assembly| 1      |
| 3   | Mechanical Steering Gear Assembly | 1 |

Fault Diagnosis and Testing

| Fault Phenomenon           | Possible Causes                                  | Measures                                      |
|----------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------|
| Steering Difficulty or Ease| Speed signal lost or interfered with             | Check speed signal                            |
|                            | Engine signal lost or interfered with            | Check engine signal                           |
|                            | Poor power supply connection                     | Inspect power supply and wiring harness       |
|                            | Suspension ball joint seized                     | Perform suspension ball joint test            |
|                            | Steering mechanism damaged                         | Replace steering mechanism                    |
|                            | Steering column damaged                            | Replace steering column assembly              |
| Steering Insensitivity     | Tie rod ball joint damaged                       | Replace tie rod                               |
|                            | Front suspension bushing damaged                 | Inspect or replace                            |
|                            | Suspension ball joint damaged                    | Inspect suspension ball joint components      |
|                            | Steering mechanism dust cover damaged            | Inspect component; replace if necessary       |
|                            | Steering mechanism mounting bolts loose          | Tighten or replace mounting bolts after inspection |
|                            | Steering column mounting bolts loose             | Tighten or replace mounting bolts after inspection |
|                            | Bolts securing steering column to steering gear pinion loose | Tighten or replace mounting bolts after inspection |
|                            | Excessive clearance in steering mechanism          | Replace steering gear assembly                |
| Excessive Steering Wheel Play | Loose C-point bolt connection                   | Check bolt torque and retighten               |
|                            | Loose bolts on steering gear                     | Tighten or replace mounting bolts after inspection |
|                            | Worn or loose ball joint bolt on tie rod end assembly | Inspect and tighten or replace mounting bolts |
| Overly Heavy Steering Wheel | EPS lacks assistance                             | Refer to fault diagnosis mode for troubleshooting |
|                            | Abnormal ABS speed signal                        | Refer to fault diagnosis mode for troubleshooting |
| Poor Steering Return       | Excessive friction inside tie rod ball joint    | Replace steering gear                         |
|                            | Steering angle signal lost or interfered with    | Check steering angle signal                   |
|                            | Defects in inner tie rod or ball joint           | Replace steering gear                         |
|                            | Four-wheel alignment parameters out of tolerance | Check and adjust four-wheel alignment         |
|                            | Low tire pressure                                | Inflate tires                                 |
|                            | Bent rack                                        | Replace steering gear                         |
|                            | Damaged gear bearing                             | Replace steering gear                         |
|                            | Loose steering gear mounting bolts               | Tighten to specified torque or replace mounting bolts after inspection |
| Squeaking Noise Between Gear and Rack | Loose tie rod ball joint                  | Replace tie rod                               |
|                            | Increased clearance between gear and rack        | Replace steering gear                         |
|                            | Motor failure                                    | Replace steering column assembly              |
| Motor Abnormal Noise       | Power supply circuit fault or abnormal battery voltage | Inspect circuit                              |
| EPS Light Always On        | EPS torque sensor failure; sensor-ECU connection fault | Replace EPS assembly                         |
|                            | Motor malfunction; motor-ECU wiring fault        | Replace EPS assembly                         |
|                            | ABS/ESP node disconnected from bus or malfunctioning | Inspect ABS/ESP circuits                     |
|                            | EPS not completed vehicle line calibration       | Perform software calibration                  |
|                            |                                                  |                                               |
| s13423                     | Tire uneven wear                                 | Check four-wheel alignment parameters         |

|                            | Abnormal tire dynamic balance                    | Check tire dynamic balance                    |
|                            | Front strut abnormality                          | Inspect front strut                           |
|                            | Brake rotor runout exceeds tolerance             | Check brake rotor runout                      |
|                            | Brake pad squealing                              | Inspect brake pads                            |
| Steering Wheel Vibration at Idle | Abnormal electronic fuel injection data       | Check electronic fuel injection data          |
original:
回正性能检查

1. 启动车辆，直线加速至 $35 \mathrm{km / h}$ 。

2. 向左或向右旋转方向盘 $90 ^{ \circ }$ ，保持 1 至 2 秒后松开。

3. 如方向盘能回正的角度超过 $70 ^{ \circ }$ ，车辆回正性能正常。

建议：如果回正性能不良，检查下列项目：转向器性能、转向柱性能、轮胎压力、悬架系统。

部件定位图

| 序号 | 部件名称 | 数量 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | 方向盘总成 | 1 |
| 2 | 转向柱总成 | 1 |
| 3 | 机械转向器总成 | 1 |

| 故障现象 | 可能的原因 | 措施 |

| 转向困难或轻松 | 发动机信号丢失或有干扰 | 检查发动机信号 |

| 转向困难或轻松 | 转向柱损坏 | 更换转向柱总成 |
| 转向不灵敏 | 横拉杆球头损坏 | 更换横拉杆 |
| 转向不灵敏 | 前悬挂轴衬损坏 | 检查或更换 |

| 转向不灵敏 | 转向柱固定螺栓松动 | 检查后打紧或更换固定螺栓 |
| 转向不灵敏 | 连接转向柱与转向机构小齿轮紧固螺栓松动 | 检查后打紧或更换固定螺栓 |
| 转向不灵敏 | 转向机构间隙过大 | 更换转向器总成 |
| 方向盘转向间隙过大 | C点螺栓连接松旷 | 检查螺栓力矩并重新打紧 |
| 方向盘转向间隙过大 | 转向器上螺栓松动 | 检查后打紧或更换固定螺栓 |
| 方向盘转向间隙过大 | 转向横拉杆端部总成上的球头螺栓磨损或松动 | 检查后打紧或更换固定螺栓 |
| 方向盘过沉 | EPS无助力 | 参考故障诊断模式排查 |
| 方向盘过沉 | ABS车速信号异常 | 参考故障诊断模式排查 |
| 回正性差 | 横拉杆球窝接头内摩擦过大 | 更换转向器 |
| 回正性差 | 转角信号丢失或有干扰 | 检查转角信号 |
| 回正性差 | 内横拉杆或球窝接头处有缺陷 | 更换转向器 |
| 回正性差 | 四轮定位参数超差 | 检测并调整四轮定位参数 |

1. 启动车辆，直线加速至 $35 \mathrm{km / h}$ 。

2. 向左或向右旋转方向盘 $90 ^{ \circ }$ ，保持 1 至 2 秒后松开。

3. 如方向盘能回正的角度超过 $70 ^{ \circ }$ ，车辆回正性能正常。

建议：如果回正性能不良，检查下列项目：转向器性能、转向柱性能、轮胎压力、悬架系统。

text_en:
General Description

The steering wheel is the primary link between the driver and the vehicle. It is mounted on the steering shaft inside the steering column. At the lower end of the steering column, the lower steering shaft connects the steering column to the steering gear. The steering column can be adjusted vertically in angle, and some models also allow height adjustment.

The steering column is equipped with a multi-directional steering wheel lock (or anti-theft lock) that has been rigorously tested. This lock features a high-security lock cylinder, significantly reducing the risk of theft.

Additional driver control switches may be installed on the steering wheel for greater convenience and comfort during driving. The following controls may be mounted on the steering wheel or steering column:

- Turn signal switch
- Headlight dimmer switch
- Windshield washer/wiper switch
- Entertainment system control switch

The steering wheel and steering column incorporate safety features designed to protect the driver. The following components may be installed on or near the steering column:

- Collapsible mechanism: Energy-absorbing steering columns collapse during frontal collisions, reducing the risk of injury to the driver. Energy absorption, collapsible steering shaft, and breakaway cushioning functions help minimize injuries in accidents.
- Rotary connector and airbag module: For further information on the operation of the rotary connector and airbag module.

Component Diagram

| Item No. | Component Name | Quantity |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Steering Wheel Assembly | 1 |
original:
一般说明

方向盘是联系驾驶员与车辆的第一条纽带。方向盘固定在转向柱内的转向轴上。在转向柱的下端，由转向下轴将转向柱连接至转向器。转向柱可以延纵向进行角度调整，部分车轴向可进行高度调节。

转向柱装有经严格试验的多方位方向盘锁（或防盗锁），此方向盘锁装有保险程度高的锁芯，从而最大程度地减少被盗的危险

方向盘上可能还安装了某些驾驶员控制开关，以使驾驶操作更为方便和舒适。以下控制开关可被安装在方向盘或转向柱上面：

转向信号开关

前照灯变光开关

刮水器洗淥器开关

娱乐系统控制开关

方向盘和转向柱具备安全功能，以保护驾驶员。以下的部件可安装在转向柱上或附近：

溃缩机构：吸能式转向柱在前端碰撞时会收缩，从而减少了对驾驶员造成伤害的风险。能量吸收功能、可溃缩式转向轴和断裂缓冲功能帮助减少事故中的伤害。

旋转连接器及安全气囊模块：关于更多旋转连接器及安全气囊模块的操作信息.。

部件示意图

| 序号 | 部件名称 | 数量 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | 方向盘总成 | 1 |

text_en:
Steering Wheel Assembly

Removal

Warning: When removing or servicing the airbag system, disconnect the system power supply and ensure it remains disconnected for more than 60 seconds.

Note: Before removing the steering wheel, make sure the steering wheel is locked and the wheels are aligned straight ahead.

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable.

Reference: Battery Inspection (4.2.15 Power System, Battery Installation and Removal)

2. Remove the driver's airbag.

Reference: Airbag Restraint System (5.1.12 Airbag Restraint System, Removal and Installation)

3. Disconnect the connector on the steering wheel that mates with the rotary connector.

4. Loosen the steering wheel lock nut until 2–3 threads remain.

5. Rock the steering wheel back and forth and side to side until fully detached.

Installation

Install in reverse order of removal.
original:
方向盘总成

拆卸

警告：在拆卸或进行安全气囊系统维修时，必须切断系统电源并保持断电 60s 以上。

注意：拆卸方向盘前，确保方向盘锁止，车轮处于正前方位置。

1. 断开蓄电池负极线束。

参考：蓄电池的检查（4.2.15 电源系统 蓄电池的安装与拆卸）

2. 拆卸驾驶员气囊。

参考：安全气囊约束系统（5.1.12 安全气囊约束系统，拆卸与安装）

3. 将方向盘上与旋转连接器配合的接插件拔出。

4. 将方向盘锁紧螺母松开，直至剩下2-3牙螺纹。

5. 前后左右晃动方向盘直至完全脱开。

安装

安装顺序与拆卸顺序相反。

方向盘总成

分解

警告：在分解或进行安全气囊系统维修时，必须切断系统电源并保持断电 60s 以上。

注意：分解方向盘前，确保方向盘锁止，车轮处于正前方位置。

1. 断开蓄电池负极线束。

参考：蓄电池的检查（4.2.15 电源系统 蓄电池的安装步骤与分解）

2. 分解驾驶员气囊。

参考：安全气囊约束系统（5.1.12 安全气囊约束系统，分解与安装步骤）

3. 将方向盘上与旋转连接器配合的接插件拔出。

4. 将方向盘锁紧螺母松开，直至剩下2-3牙螺纹。

5. 前后左右晃动方向盘直至完全脱开。

安装步骤

安装步骤顺序与分解顺序相反。

方向盘总成

拆除

警告：在拆除或进行安全气囊系统维修时，必须切断系统电源并保持断电 60s 以上。

须知：拆除方向盘前，确保方向盘锁止，车轮处于正前方位置。

1. 断开蓄电池负极线束。

参考：蓄电池的检查（4.2.15 电源系统 蓄电池的组装与拆除）

2. 拆除驾驶员气囊。

参考：安全气囊约束系统（5.1.12 安全气囊约束系统，拆除与组装）

3. 将方向盘上与旋转连接器配合的接插件拔出。

4. 将方向盘锁紧螺母松开，直至剩下2-3牙螺纹。

5. 前后左右晃动方向盘直至完全脱开。

组装

组装顺序与拆除顺序相反。

text_en:
Visual/External Inspection

1. Inspect easily accessible or visible system components to determine if any obvious damage or failure is present that could cause this symptom.

Component Schematic

2.4.3-4
Steering Gear Assembly

| Item No. | Part Name | Quantity |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Mechanical Steering Gear Assembly | 1 |
| 2 | Hex Flange Nut | 2 |
| 3 | Hex Flange Bolt and Flat Washer Assembly | 2 |
| 4 | Extension Rod | 1 |
| 5 | Hex Head Bolt and Spring Washer Assembly | 1 |
| 6 | Slotted Hex Nut | 2 |
| 7 | Cotter Pin | 2 |

Removal and Installation

Mechanical Steering Gear Assembly

Removal

1. Turn the front wheels straight ahead.

2. Remove the lower steering column dust cover assembly.

3. Remove the bolt connecting the lower steering shaft to the extension rod.

Note: When removing the bolt connecting the lower steering shaft to the extension rod, secure the steering wheel with a rope or strap to prevent rotation.

Note: Before removing the bolt connecting the lower steering shaft to the extension rod, mark the alignment positions on both the lower steering shaft and the extension rod.

4. Loosen the clamping bracket of the mechanical steering gear dust cover assembly.

5. Lift and support the vehicle.

6. Remove the front wheel.

7. Remove the cotter pin and ball joint lock nut.

| 6 | 六角开槽螺母 | 2 |
| 7 | 开口销 | 2 |

拆卸与安装

机械转向器总成

拆卸

1. 将前轮朝向正前方。

2. 拆除转向下管柱防尘罩总成。

3. 将连接转向下轴与加长杆的螺栓拆下。

注意：在拆卸转向下轴与加长杆连接螺栓时，应将用绳/带固定方向盘，防止其转动。

注意：在拆卸转向下轴与加长杆连接螺栓前，应在转向下轴与加长杆上标上配合标记。

4. 松开机械转向器防尘罩总成扣压支架。

5. 举升并支撑车辆。

6. 拆卸前轮。

7. 卸下开口销及球销锁紧螺母。

Visual/External Inspection

8. Disconnect the outer tie rod assembly with ball joint (right) from the steering knuckle.

Note: Do not damage the dust cover of the tie rod end ball joint during disassembly. Replace the tie rod end if the dust cover is damaged.

9. Disconnect the outer tie rod assembly with ball joint (left) from the steering knuckle.

Recommendation: Follow the same procedure as on the right side.

10. Remove the engine mount assembly.

11. Remove the steering gear and engine mount assembly connection bolts.

text_en:
Visual/External Inspection

Steering Gear Input Shaft Torque Inspection

1. Secure the steering gear using a bench vise.

2. Rotate the steering gear input shaft using a special tool at a speed of one revolution every 4 to 6 seconds, and read the torque value at the fifth revolution.

Rotational Torque: (1.0 ± 0.3) N·m

If the rotational torque is outside the specified range, replace the entire steering gear assembly.

Installation

Install in the reverse order of disassembly.
original:
目视/外观检查

转向器输入轴旋转力矩检查

1. 将转向器用台钳固定。

2. 用专用工具以 4 秒至 6 秒一圈的速度旋转转向器输入轴并读取第5 圈的扭力值。

转动力矩：（ $( 1.0 \pm 0.3 ) $ ）N.m

如果转动扭矩不在规定范围内，则更换转向器总成。

安装

安装顺序与拆卸顺序相反。

text_en:
Steering Rod End Assembly

Removal

1. Turn the front wheels straight ahead.

2. Lift and support the vehicle.

3. Remove the front wheel.

4. Loosen the steering rod (right) pre-adjustment nut.

Torque: 75 N·m

5. Loosen the steering rod (left) pre-adjustment nut.

Recommendation: Perform the same steps as on the right side.

6. Disconnect the steering rod end assembly from the steering knuckle.

7. Unscrew the steering rod end assembly from the steering rod (counterclockwise direction).

4. 将转向横拉杆（右）上前束调节螺母松开。

扭矩：75N.m

5. 将转向横拉杆（左）上前束调节螺母松开。

建议：执行与右侧相同的步骤。

7. 将转向横拉杆端接头总成从转向横拉杆上旋出（逆时针方向）。

text_en:
Steering Tie Rod End Assembly

Note: Before rotating the steering tie rod end assembly, mark the alignment on the tie rod.

Check of Ball Joint Turning Torque for Steering Tie Rod End Assembly

Inspect whether the ball joint is loose; replace the steering tie rod end assembly if necessary.

Install the ball joint locknut onto the ball joint and tighten it until no further movement is possible.

Pivot the ball joint forward and backward or left and right at least five times.

Use a torque wrench to continuously turn the nut at a speed of one revolution every 3 to 5 seconds, and record the torque value at the fifth revolution.

Turning Torque: 1 N·m ~ 3 N·m

If the turning torque is outside the specified range, replace the mechanical steering gear assembly.

Installation

Refer to the disassembly and installation procedure for the mechanical steering gear.
original:

注意：在旋动转向横拉杆端接头总成前，应在转拉杆上标上配合标记。

横拉杆端接头总成球销转动力矩检查

检查球销是否松旷，必要时更换横拉杆端接头；

将球销锁紧螺母装配到球销上并旋到不能移动为止；

前后/左右摆动球销5次或以上；

用扭矩扳手以每3至5 秒一圈的速度连续转动螺母，读取第5圈的扭力值。

转动力矩：1 N.m~3 N.m

如果转动扭矩不在规定范围内，则更换机械转向器总成。

text_en:
Steering Tie Rod Dust Cap

Removal

1. Turn the front wheels straight ahead.

2. Lift and support the vehicle.

3. Remove the steering tie rod end joint.

4. Remove the toe adjustment nut from the steering tie rod.

5. Remove the outer rubber clamp.

6. Cut and discard the inner one-time-use clamp.

7. Remove the steering tie rod dust cap from the steering tie rod.

Installation

text_en:
General Description

The steering wheel is fixed to the steering shaft inside the steering column. At the lower end of the steering column, the lower steering shaft connects the steering column to the steering gear. The steering column can be adjusted in angle along the longitudinal axis.

The steering column is equipped with a multi-directional steering wheel lock (or anti-theft lock) that has undergone rigorous testing and features a high-security lock cylinder, significantly reducing the risk of theft.

Collapse mechanism: The energy-absorbing steering column collapses during frontal collisions, reducing the risk of injury to the driver. Energy absorption function, combined with the collapsible steering shaft and fracture buffering capabilities, helps minimize injuries in accidents.

Component Diagram

| Item | Part Name | Quantity | Item | Part Name | Quantity |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Steering Wheel Lock Nut | 1 | 5 | Hex Head Bolt and Flat Washer Assembly | 1 |
| 2 | Steering Wheel Assembly | 1 | 6 | Lower Steering Shaft Assembly | 1 |
| 3 | Hex Flange Face Toothed Nut | 1 | 7 | Hex Head Bolt and Spring Washer Assembly | 1 |
| 4 | Upper Steering Shaft Assembly | 1 |  |  |  |
original:
一般说明

方向盘固定在转向柱内的转向轴上。在转向柱的下端，由转向下轴将转向柱连接至转向器。转向柱可以延纵向进行角度调整。

转向柱装有经严格试验的多方位方向盘锁（或防盗锁），此方向盘锁装有保险程度高的锁芯，从而最大程度地减少被盗的危险

溃缩机构：吸能式转向柱在前端碰撞时会收缩，从而减少了对驾驶员造成伤害的风险。能量吸收功能、从而减少可溃缩式转向轴和断裂缓冲功能帮助减少事故中的伤害。

| 序号 | 部件名称 | 数量 | 序号 | 部件名称 | 数量 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | 方向盘锁紧螺母 | 1 | 5 | 六角头螺栓和平垫圈组合件 | 1 |
| 2 | 方向盘总成 | 1 | 6 | 转向下轴总成 | 1 |
| 3 | 六角法兰面承面带齿螺母 | 1 | 7 | 六角头螺栓和弹簧垫圈组合件 | 1 |
| 4 | 转向上轴总成 | 1 |  |  |  |

text_en:
Steering Column Assembly

Warning: When removing or servicing the airbag system, disconnect the system power supply and maintain power disconnection for more than 60 seconds.

Note: Before removal, ensure the steering wheel is locked and the wheels are aligned straight ahead.

1. Disconnect the negative battery cable.

Reference: Battery Inspection

2. Remove the driver's airbag and steering wheel.

Reference: Driver's Airbag and Steering Wheel

3. Remove the upper steering lock housing and lower steering lock housing.

4. Remove the combination switch assembly and rotary connector.

5. Remove the driver's lower cover plate.

6. Disconnect the four wire harness clips on the steering column.

7. Disconnect the connector on the power assist motor.

8. Remove the bolts connecting the upper steering shaft to the lower steering shaft.
Torque: 35 N·m

9. Remove the mounting bolt at the lower installation point of the upper steering shaft.
Torque: 85 N·m
original:
转向上轴总成

警告：在拆卸或进行安全气囊系统维修时，必须切断系统电源并保持断电 60s 以上。

注意：拆卸前，确保方向盘锁止，车轮处于正前方位置。

1. 断开蓄电池负极线束。

参考：蓄电池的检查

2. 拆卸驾驶员气囊及方向盘。

参考：驾驶员气囊及方向盘

3. 拆卸转向锁壳（上）、转向锁壳（下）。

4. 拆卸组合开关总成与旋转连接器。

5. 拆卸主驾下护板.

6. 断开转向柱上的 4 处线束线卡。

7. 拆卸助力电机上的接插件。

8. 拆卸转向上轴与转向下轴连接螺栓。

扭矩：35N.m

9. 拆卸转向上轴下安装点处固定螺栓。

扭矩：85N.m

text_en:
Driver's Airbag

The driver's airbag is secured inside the steering wheel by three steel clips. It deploys during a frontal collision, creating a soft cushion between the driver and the steering wheel to protect the driver. Abbreviated as DAB.
original:
主驾驶安全气囊

主驾驶安全气囊通过三个钢卡脚卡接在方向盘内，发生正面碰撞时打开，在驾驶员和方向盘之间形成柔软气袋保护驾驶员。简称 DAB。

text_en:
Passenger Airbag

The passenger airbag is connected to the instrument panel on its upper side via a six-bolt nut assembly, and fixed to the steering support on its lower side with two bolts. It deploys during a frontal collision, forming a soft airbag between the front passenger and the instrument panel to protect the occupant. Abbreviated as PAB.

text_en:
Side curtain airbag

The side curtain airbag is installed inside the side interior panel and roof lining of the vehicle body. It deploys during a side impact, forming a soft airbag between the occupant and the vehicle to protect the occupant. Abbreviated as CAB.
original:
侧气帘

侧气帘安装在车身侧围内饰板和顶衬内，发生侧面碰撞时打开，在乘员和之间形成柔软气袋保护乘员。简称 CAB。

侧气帘

侧气帘组装在车身侧围内饰板和顶衬内，发生侧面碰撞时打开，在乘员和之间形成柔软气袋保护乘员。简称 CAB。

text_en:
Airbag Controller

The airbag controller is installed on the floor of the central console beneath the center console box, between the handbrake and gear shift. The airbag controller contains a frontal collision sensor capable of detecting front impact signals. It monitors the entire airbag system. Abbreviated as ECU.

text_en:
Collision Sensor

Note: The collision sensor's terminals have polarity; terminal 1 is the signal terminal, and terminal 2 is the ground terminal. They must not be reversed, otherwise the airbag controller will be unable to complete its self-diagnosis.
original:
碰撞传感器

注意：碰撞传感器的针脚有正负之分，针脚 1为信号端，2 为接地端，不能接反，否则气囊控制器无法完成自检。
paraphrases:
碰撞传感器

提示：碰撞传感器的针脚有正负之分，针脚 1为信号端，2 为接地端，不能接反，否则气囊控制器无法完成自检。

碰撞传感器

注意：碰撞传感器的针脚有正负之分，针脚 1为信号端，2 为接地端，不能接反，否则气囊控制器无法完成自检。

碰撞传感器

须知：碰撞传感器的针脚有正负之分，针脚 1为信号端，2 为接地端，不能接反，否则气囊控制器无法完成自检。

text_en:
Installation

1. Connect the driver's airbag connector.

2. Align the three metal tabs on the driver's airbag with the three mounting holes inside the steering wheel, then press firmly until it clicks into place.
original:
安装

1. 插上驾驶员气囊接插件

2. 将驾驶员安全气囊的三个钢卡脚对准方向盘内的三个安装孔，用力按下即可
paraphrases:
装配

1. 插上驾驶员气囊接插件

2. 将驾驶员安全气囊的三个钢卡脚对准方向盘内的三个装配孔，用力按下即可

安装步骤

1. 插上驾驶员气囊接插件

2. 将驾驶员安全气囊的三个钢卡脚对准方向盘内的三个安装步骤孔，用力按下即可

组装

1. 插上驾驶员气囊接插件

2. 将驾驶员安全气囊的三个钢卡脚对准方向盘内的三个组装孔，用力按下即可

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Turn off the engine and set the key to the OFF position.

2. Rotate the steering wheel clockwise by 90 degrees.

3. Insert a small screwdriver from above the steering lock housing into the wire of the airbag clip, press down firmly to release the wire from the clip.

4. Rotate counterclockwise by 180°, then repeat step 3.

5. Continue rotating counterclockwise by another 90°, then repeat step 3.

6. Remove the airbag connector.
original:
拆卸

1. 熄灭发动机，使钥匙处于OFF档。

2. 将方向盘顺时针旋转90

3. 从转向锁壳上方将小螺丝刀深入到气囊刚卡脚的钢丝上面，用力往下按，将钢丝从卡脚中释放出来。

4. 逆时针旋转180°，重复3操作

5. 继续逆时针旋转90°，重复3操作

6. 取下气囊的接插件

Installation

1. Clean debris from the grooves of all components to prevent belt wear caused by contaminants.

2. Install the multi-ribbed belt sequentially onto the vibration damper pulley assembly, air conditioning compressor assembly, generator pulley, idler pulley assembly, water pump pulley, and belt tensioner assembly, following the indicated rotation direction marked on the multi-ribbed belt.

Figure reference:

1 - Generator assembly
2 - Water pump pulley
3 - Air conditioning compressor assembly
4 - Vibration damper pulley assembly
5 - Belt tensioner assembly
6 - Idler pulley assembly

text_en:
Hint

The intake camshaft is longer than the exhaust camshaft.

Ensure the correct assembly position before installing the camshaft bearing cap; it should not be eccentric.

4. Apply an appropriate amount of lubricant (type: 140 GL-5 gear oil) to all contact surfaces of the camshaft.

5. Install the camshaft lower bearing onto the first bearing surface of the camshaft bearing cap.

6. Apply sealant to the bottom surface of the camshaft bearing cap.

text_en:
Crankshaft Axial Clearance Inspection

1. Secure the dial indicator and universal dial indicator holder to the cylinder block using bolts, positioning it opposite the crank arm.

2. Push the crankshaft toward the dial indicator and set the dial indicator to "0".

3. Push the crankshaft in the opposite direction and read the displayed value.

Standard Value: (0.10 ~ 0.29) mm

text_en:
Cylinder Bore Clearance Inspection

1. Use a micrometer to measure the piston diameter at a height of 10 mm.

Standard value: (75.946 ~ 75.964) mm

2. Select three cross-sections within the cylinder bore according to height (cross-section C: measurement depth 10 mm from cylinder head surface; cross-section D: measurement depth 40 mm; cross-section E: measurement depth 70 mm). At each cross-section, measure the bore diameter in two mutually perpendicular directions (AB).

text_en:
Disassembly

1. Disconnect the negative battery terminal.

2. Remove the engine assembly.

3. Remove the rear crankshaft oil seal.

4. Remove the oil pan.

5. Remove the oil pump.

6. Remove the cylinder head.

7. Loosen and remove the 8 connecting rod bolts in sequence from both sides toward the center, then take off the connecting rod caps.

8. Remove the connecting rod bolts.

Note:
Connecting rod bolts are single-use components.

9. Use a rubber mallet to push the piston and connecting rod assembly out of the cylinder block.

Note:
Be careful not to damage the cylinder wall or crankcase with the large end of the connecting rod.
1. Avoid the piston cooling nozzle to prevent damage.

10. Remove the connecting rod bearings and place them in groups for reinstallation.

Note:
Do not damage the upper and lower connecting rod bearings during disassembly.
The removed piston and connecting rod assemblies, along with the upper and lower connecting rod bearings, should be grouped and labeled according to cylinder order.

11. Use needle-nose pliers to remove the retaining rings.

Note:
1. Do not remove unless necessary.
Ensure the notch at the end of the piston pin bore retainer ring is offset from the notch on the piston pin bore.

12. Dispose of the retaining rings.

13. Remove the piston pin.

14. Using a piston ring expander, remove the oil control ring assembly, second compression ring, and first compression ring in sequence, ensuring each piston ring contacts the expander's seating surface evenly.
original:
拆卸

1. 断开蓄电池负极

2. 拆卸发动机总成

3. 拆卸曲轴后油封

4. 拆卸油底壳

5. 拆卸机油泵

6. 拆卸气缸盖

7. 按照从两边到中间的顺序拧松并拆下 8 个连杆螺栓，取下连杆盖

8. 取下连杆螺栓

提示

连杆螺栓为一次性零部件。

9. 使用橡胶锤将活塞和连杆总成推出缸体

提示

小心不要让连杆大端损坏缸壁和曲轴箱。

1 应避让活塞冷却喷嘴，避免损坏。

10. 取下连杆轴瓦，并分组放置，以便安装

提示

拆卸过程中不要损伤上、下连杆瓦。

拆下的活塞连杆组件及上、下连杆瓦按气缸顺序编号分组摆放。

11. 使用尖嘴钳拆下卡簧

提示

1 如无必要，不得拆卸。

确保活塞销孔卡簧末端缺口与活塞销孔上的缺

口部分相互错开。

12. 报废卡簧

13. 取下活塞销

14.使用活塞环扩张器，将活塞环平整地与扩张器的座面接触的方式，依次拆卸油环组件、第二道气环及第一道气环

Spring force is (486 N ± 24) N when compressed to 24.8 mm

text_en:
Warning

The exhaust valve is filled with sodium. Sodium is a strong alkali and can cause dangerous chemical reactions. Handle and dispose of it with extreme caution.

Do not intentionally expose the sodium inside the exhaust valve. If sodium gets into the eyes, it may cause blindness. If sodium contacts the skin, it may cause burns.

If sodium inside the exhaust valve becomes exposed, perform all necessary preparations to safely remove and dispose of the sodium.

When removing a damaged exhaust valve, always wear rubber gloves and safety goggles.

Do not intentionally cut or damage the exhaust valve to remove sodium.

1. The original part must be reinstalled in its original position and configuration.

1. Disconnect the negative battery terminal
2. Remove the engine assembly
3. Remove the cylinder head cover
4. Remove the intake manifold
5. Remove the exhaust manifold
6. Remove the camshaft
7. Remove the cylinder head
8. Remove the hydraulic tappet assembly and roller rocker arm assembly
original:
提示

排气门内填充有钠。钠是一种强碱，可以产生危险的化学反应。对其进行处理和报废时要非常小心。

不要故意暴露排气门中的钠。如果钠进入眼中，则可能会导致失明。如果钠接触到皮肤，则可能会导致烫伤。

如果排气门内的钠暴露，则执行所有必要准备以安全去除和报废钠。

拆下损坏的排气门时，务必佩戴橡胶手套和安全眼镜。

不要故意切开或损坏排气门以去除钠。

1 必须将原来的零件按照原来的组合安装到原有位置。

Ensure that the valve spring contacts the flat surface of the locating cylindrical boss on the cylinder head; do not allow it to catch on the cylindrical surface.

6. Place the valve press tool so that it is perpendicular to the valve

7. Tighten the valve press tool until the valve lock clip can be installed

8. Apply a thin layer of grease inside the valve lock clip to prevent it from slipping, then install it onto the valve

9. Remove the valve press tool

10. Lightly tap the valve spring seat with a rubber hammer to relieve stress and ensure the valve lock clip is securely seated

11. Apply an appropriate amount of lubricant to the hydraulic tappet assembly, then insert it into the clip at the rear end of the roller rocker arm assembly

text_en:
Working Principle

Under normal driving conditions, fresh air passes through the air filter into the pre-turbocharger piping, is compressed by the turbocharger, then flows into the post-turbocharger piping. It subsequently goes through the intercooler, throttle body, and intake manifold before entering the engine for combustion.

When the accelerator pedal is suddenly released during normal driving, the throttle body reduces airflow or closes completely, while the turbocharger impeller continues to rotate at high speed, pushing compressed air into the post-throttle piping. This causes a sudden pressure increase in the piping upstream of the throttle body. High-pressure gas may damage the piping, and it exerts significant backpressure on the impeller, causing its rotational speed to drop sharply. At the same time that the throttle body restricts or closes, the engine continues drawing in air, creating a negative pressure (vacuum) in the intake manifold. This vacuum, transmitted through the piping, controls the intake bypass valve. Together with the high pressure upstream of the throttle body, it opens the bypass valve (a vacuum-controlled diaphragm-type structure), allowing high-pressure air upstream of the throttle to be redirected into the pre-turbocharger piping, thus relieving pressure. Using an intake bypass valve enables the release of pressurized air before it accumulates excessive pressure, protecting both the turbocharger and the piping system. Additionally, sudden throttle release often coincides with gear shifting. After pressure relief, the turbocharger's rotational speed does not drop significantly, preparing it for subsequent acceleration and resulting in quicker power response and smoother gear shifts.

Closed State: In the absence of electrical power, the internal spring holds the valve body in the closed position, blocking the passage between the turbocharger outlet and the intake manifold.

Open State: When powered, the solenoid pulls the valve body’s sealing ring out of the seal seat, opening the passage between the turbocharger outlet and the intake manifold, allowing gas to flow back into the intake system.

Specifications

| Item | Item | Unit | Min | Typical | Max |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Operating Voltage | Operating Voltage | V | 8 | 12 | 16 |
| Response Time | Opening | ms | - | ≤80 | - |
| Response Time | Closing | ms | - | ≤40 | - |
| Stroke | Stroke | mm | - | 5.5 | - |

Pin Definitions

| Pin Number | Function |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Power Supply |
| 2 | Ground |
original:
工作原理

整车在正常行驶时，新鲜空气通过空滤到增压前管路，经增压器增压后，进入增压后管路，通过中冷器、节气门、进气歧管之后进入发动机参与燃烧。

当在正常行驶中有突然松油门动作，此时节气门通过气流变小甚至关闭，而增压器叶轮高速旋转继续向压后管路压入气体，在节气门之前的管路压力瞬间变高，高压气体可能会损坏管路，并且对叶轮产生很大反作用力（回压），使叶轮转速剧烈下降。而在节气门变小或关闭同时，发动机继续吸入气体，在进气歧管形成一个负压（即真空），负压通过管路控制进气旁通阀并与节气门前的高压共同作用将旁通阀（真空控制隔膜式结构）打开，使节气门前的高压气体旁通到压前管路，实现泄压的目的。 使用进气旁通阀可以使压后气体在还未积累很高压力前将其卸掉，这样可以保护增压器和管路，并且松油门往往伴随换挡动作，泄压后增压器转速不至于下降很多，为之后提速作准备，使动力响应更为迅速，换挡更加平顺。

关闭状态：在没有通电的情况下，内部弹簧将阀体保持在封闭位置，增压器出口至进气管之间的通道被堵塞。

打开状态：在通电的情况下，衔铁将阀体密封圈拉出密封座，增压器出口至进气管之间的通道被打开，允许气体再次流回进气管中。

规格参数

| 项目 | 项目 | 单位 | 最小 | 典型 | 最大 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 工作电压 | 工作电压 | V | 8 | 12 | 16 |
| 相应时间 | 打开 | ms | - | ≤80 | - |
| 相应时间 | 关闭 | ms | - | ≤40 | - |
| 行程 | 行程 | mm | - | 5.5 | - |

引脚定义

| 引脚号 | 功能 |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | 接电源 |
| 2 | 接地 |

text_en:
Operating Principle

The electronic throttle body is a key component of the engine intake system. Its primary function is to adjust the intake passage area according to the driver's intent, thereby controlling the intake volume and meeting the engine's varying intake requirements under different operating conditions. At the same time, it feeds back the throttle plate position signal to the control unit for precise control. The electronic throttle body consists of four main modules: drive module, transmission module, actuation module, and feedback module, with all components integrated within a single throttle housing. The throttle feedback module employs a dual-redundant structure. In case of failure, the throttle plate will be locked at the limp-home position (NLP), determined mechanically and located above the mechanical lower limit. The electronic throttle body can only be controlled via the corresponding electronic control unit or electronic test circuit, and in principle, the throttle plate must never dynamically run into the mechanical stop position.

When a fault occurs within the throttle body itself, a "limp" control function is provided. This "limp" control function includes the following two modes:

1. Limp Control when the system cannot regulate engine power output
   - ECU limits engine power output
   - ECU disables engine ignition output

2. Limp Control when the system cannot monitor the driver’s intent
   - ECU limits engine power output
   - ECU forces the engine into idle operation mode

Fault symptoms: Weak acceleration, frequent return or sticking of the throttle plate

Common causes:
- Poor wiring harness or sensor performance causing ECU misjudgment, forcing the throttle to remain in a small opening state
- Internal component damage (e.g., magnets) due to dropping or impact during use or repair
- Excessive vibration level at the intake manifold
- Severe carbon buildup in the electronic throttle body caused by engine issues

Maintenance precautions:
- Avoid any impact to the electronic throttle body during repairs; do not use the throttle body after it has been dropped
- After detecting a suspected fault caused by the electronic throttle body, simple resistance measurements between terminals and cross-testing methods may be used for verification

Pin Definitions

| Pin Number | Function |
| --- | --- |
| 1 | Motor positive terminal |
| 2 | Motor negative terminal |
| 3 | Sensor signal 2 output |
| 4 | Sensor ground |
| 5 | 5V power supply |
| 6 | Sensor signal 1 output |
original:
工作原理

电子节气门体是组成发动机进气系统的一个关键部件，其主要功能是根据驾驶员的驾驶意图，调节进气通道面积，从而控制进气量，满足发动机不同工况下的进气需求，同时将节气门阀板的位置信号反馈给控制单元实现精确控制。 电子节气门体由驱动模块、传动模块、执行模块和反馈模块四大部分构成，所有零部件全部集成在一个节气门壳体中。节气门反馈模块采用了两路冗余结构。发生故障时，节气门阀板会停在采用机械方式确定的跛行回家位置（NLP），它位于机械下止点上方。电子节气门体只能通过相应的电子控制单元或电子测试电路进行控制，原则上必须确保节气门阀板不会动态的运行至机械止点位置。

在节气门自身出现故障时，提供“跛行”控制功能。“跛行”控制功能有以下两种控制模式

1. 系统无法控制发动机动力时的“跛行”控制

） ECU 将限制发动机动力输出

1 ECU 将关闭发动机点火输出

2. 系统无法监测驾驶员的意图时的“跛行”控制

ECU 将限制发动机动力输出

1 ECU 将强迫发动机进入怠速运行工作状态

故障现象：车辆加速无力，节气门阀片频繁回位或卡死

一般故障原因：

线束或传感器工作不良，导致 ECU 产生误判，强制控制节气门处于小开度状态。

使用过程或维修过程中跌落或碰撞导致内部零件（磁钢等）破裂。

text_en:
Warning

Wait 30 minutes after engine shutdown before performing maintenance to avoid injuries from hot components.

This operation requires assistance from a helper to prevent injury caused by falling parts.

If fasteners are difficult to remove, apply an appropriate amount of rust remover to the fasteners and use the "tighten first, then loosen" method: first turn in the tightening direction, then slowly loosen using a symmetrical left-and-right approach.

1. Remove the turbocharger
2. Loosen and remove the 9 nuts in the order shown in the diagram
original:
警告

熄火 30min 后再进行维修操作，以免高温部件造成人员伤害。

执行此项操作时需要助手帮助，以防零部件落下对人员造成伤害。

若紧固件拆卸困难，可在紧固件处喷涂适量除锈剂，同时采用先紧后松的方式拆卸，即先向拧紧方向转动，然后采用慢松动、左右对称的方法拆卸。

1. 拆卸增压器

2. 按图示顺序拧松并拆下 9 个螺母

text_en:
Warning

Perform maintenance operations only after the engine has been turned off for 30 minutes to avoid injuries from high-temperature components.

This operation requires assistance from a helper to prevent injury from falling parts.

If fasteners are difficult to remove, apply an appropriate amount of rust remover to the fastener and use the "tighten first, then loosen" method: first turn in the tightening direction, then slowly loosen using a symmetrical left-and-right technique.

1. Remove the turbocharger
2. Loosen and remove the 9 nuts in the order shown in the diagram
original:
警告

熄火 30min 后再进行维修操作，以免高温部件造成人员伤害。

执行此项操作时需要助手帮助，以防零部件落下对人员造成伤害。

若紧固件拆卸困难，可在紧固件处喷涂适量除锈剂，同时采用先紧后松的方式拆卸，即先向拧紧方向转动，然后采用慢松动、左右对称的方法拆卸。

1. 拆卸增压器

2. 按图示顺序拧松并拆下 9 个螺母

Caution

If the fasteners are difficult to remove, apply a moderate amount of rust remover to the fastener area. Use the "tighten first, then loosen" method: first turn in the tightening direction, then gradually loosen using a symmetrical left-and-right approach.

1. Lift the vehicle to an appropriate position.

2. Remove the two nuts and take out the sealing gasket.

3. Loosen the two front exhaust hangers.
